results.title: Masud Rana
results.overview: Based on Qazi Anwar Hussain's novel series Masud Rana aka MR-9.

results.title: Leonora in the Morning Light
results.overview: Leonora Carrington, an outstanding figure of surrealism, along with Frida Kahlo, was one of Mexico's most famous painters. As the long-time partner of Max Ernst and close friend of André Breton and Jean Miró, she continually struggles with her visionary imagination, which often triggers serious psychological crises.

results.title: Dernsie: The Amazing Life of Bruce Dern
results.original_title: Dernsie: The Amazing Life of Bruce Dern
results.overview: DERNSIE is an intimate portrait of Bruce Dern—tireless, uncompromising, and one of the last living legends of his generation—whose endurance has shaped both a turbulent life and one of Hollywood’s most enduring careers. A relentless runner on and off screen, Dern has outlasted the very industry that defined him.

results.title: Dream Stall
results.overview: When her father (Mark Lee) decides to shut down You & Me Bak Kut Teh, their family bak kut teh hawker business, top-scoring university graduate Enya (Annette Lee) takes it upon herself to save it.  She successfully persuades her childhood friends Tammy (Xixi Lim) and Ahji (Jaspers Lai) to quit their jobs and join her in reopening business, but their endeavour gets off to a bad start when famous local actress Estella Tsai (Ya Hui), with the help of her manager Doreen (Cassandra See), open a restaurant next to them, selling the exact same dish.  Determined not to lose to her newfound rivals, Enya feigns interest in a food documentary YouTuber, Preston (Xander Pang) — who has a reputation of saving local F&B businesses with his videos but only does so pro-bono. Will she succeed in keeping the shop alive?

results.title: The Light of Aisha
results.overview: Aisha, a 13-year-old girl, lives in 11th century Al-Andalus, where fireworks displays are the most popular entertainment and the one big passion of young Aisha, who dreams of becoming a professional rocketeer one day. Someday, the adventurous alchemist Txawir comes to town, using Aisha for his own purposes and convincing her to steal a banned book from the Calipha’s library without permission. Txawir disappears with the book, for which Aisha’s father is blamed. To recover the book and save her father, Aisha embarks on an adventurous journey…

results.title: I See Buildings Fall Like Lightning
results.original_title: I See Buildings Fall Like Lightning
results.overview: Childhood friends Patrick, Shiv, Rian, Oli, and Conor played together, skipped school together, and dreamt of the lives they would have one day. Now they’re thirty, and the future they imagined is slipping quietly out of reach.

results.title: Enough
results.overview: While researching a class assignment, Ashley, a disillusioned college student crosses paths with Erika, a quiet librarian, and is drawn into the decades-old fight for Japanese American redress and the story of a lawyer who must find the courage to testify in  order to help heal a community--and himself.

results.title: Black Holes Suck
results.overview: After cracking his formula for unlimited energy, Cal, a lonely genius unknowingly agrees to a date with an Alien who's true motives lies in obtaining his formula before it can be used to wreak havoc amongst the Stars

results.title: Full Phil
results.overview: Philip Doom, a wealthy American industrialist who attempts to reconnect with his daughter Madeleine during a luxurious trip to Paris. Unfortunately, French cuisine, a 1950s horror film and an intrusive hotel employee disrupt the smooth running of their stay.

results.title: Forticus: Streaming! The One Who Inherits His Oshi
results.original_title: フォルティクス　配信！推しを継ぐもの
results.overview: Tsuyoshi Honjo and Naoto Soda are employees of an unremarkable production company, SLOPPY DOGS are huge fans of the popular tokusatsu series, "Shinsei Denshou Forticus" that's streaming on TTFC. Instead of working, they watch Forticus and get scolded by their colleague, Koharu Umishiro. One day, after being pressured by their boss to go on an interview, the three of them got caught up in a crazy incident! And then the "real" Forticus appears?!

results.title: Hallowarrior
results.overview: Pumpkin, the last girl on earth and sole survivor of a humanity-ending plague, scavenging the wasteland for supplies on the eve of Halloween. Pumpkin’s lonely holiday ritual is interrupted by the arrival of a savage gang of raiders at her doorstep, led by the fearsome Thalia. Outnumbered and armed with candy, wit and weapons, Pumpkin must ferociously fight back to survive the night.

results.title: UAP
results.overview: When a group of friends, on their annual 4th of July trip, finds a UAP (Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena) that lands behind their lake house, they must decide if they want to use it for selfish gain, or save the world from destruction.

results.title: LOVE
results.overview: A gorgeous and frequently emotional rumination on the “big things” in life, James Gallagher’s new short film, Love, poses questions on what we love, why we love it, and what happens when the desire to win becomes detrimental to our experience of ourselves and other people. While that description seems preachy, the film is not didactic—on the contrary, its plot is extremely loose and impressionistic, requiring the viewer some effort to construct its fast-moving snippets into a coherent narrative.

results.title: Sugar
results.overview: Gay besties Jayke and Matty's friendship is put to the test when an anonymous sugar daddy offers them exorbitant sums for custom fetish videos. SUGAR offers a thought provoking cautionary tale packaged in a queer dark comedy thriller.

results.title: Guess Who's Calling!
results.overview: Baptiste, a talented imitator, is unable to make a living from his art. One day, he is approached by Pierre Chozène, a famous but discreet novelist, constantly disturbed by incessant calls from his publisher, his daughter, his ex-wife... Pierre, who needs peace and quiet to write his most ambitious text, then suggests that Baptiste become his 'answering machine' by pretending to be him on the phone... Little by little, Baptiste doesn't just imitate the writer: he develops his character!

results.title: The Dead Place
results.overview: Troubled high school senior Isaac [Veliu] is plagued by visions of the dead. This causes friction in his family and makes him an outcast at school. His only friend Katharine [Graves] is obsessed with the paranormal and tries desperately to help him, but a ‘New Kid’ [Thornton] pushes him to give in to the demon trying to burrow its way inside him [Oberst]. As he is consumed by the evil feeding off the dead souls that haunt him, Katharine is the only one that stands between Isaac and his darker impulses. To satisfy the bloodlust of the demon that dwells within him.

results.title: Dua Lipa: Live From Mexico
results.overview: Live from Mexico, a brand new concert film capturing the high-octane finale of the global Radical Optimism Tour at Mexico City's Estadio GNP Seguros

results.title: A Toast to Us
results.overview: The struggles and bravery of modern women balancing family, love, and self-worth, encouraging them to stop crying for others, embrace self-love, and celebrate every meaningful moment in life.

results.title: Where the Wind Comes From
results.overview: Alyssa, a rebellious 19 year-old girl, and her friend Mehdi — a shy and introverted 23-year-old young man — who use their imagination to escape their unpromising reality.  When they discover a contest in the south of Tunisia that may allow them to flee for real, they decide to undertake the road trip regardless of the obstacles in their way.

results.title: A Girl Unknown
results.overview: A Chinese girl is passed between three families from the age of 6 to 18, receiving each time a new name and identity. As she searches for belonging and the possibility of love, she has to navigate between the weight of her past and the uncertainty of her future, until she finds her own way.

results.title: The Feast of the Wolf
results.overview: The wolves are returning to a barren region in the Croatian-Dalmatian hinterland. Though the tourist destinations of the Adriatic coast are less than half an hour away, people in the deserted villages of Bukovica believe that "Brussels" represents evil and flies the wolves over by helicopter. Ana, a dedicated veterinarian, attempts to refute these theories and engage with the people on the ground.

results.title: Cry Out
results.overview: Akiko, a girl living a hard life after her father passes away and her mother's new boyfriend turns abusive, starts receiving encouraging letters from her 30-year-old-future self. Akiko also starts to get bullied in school, and her teacher Shinomiya tries to help her, but ends up losing her job. Akiko also unearths a story written to her by her father, telling her how he originally met her mother, who was the abused daughter of a politician.

results.title: Yamaguchi-kun Isn't So Bad
results.original_title: 山口くんはワルくない

results.title: Rave On
results.overview: A deep dive into Berlin’s club scene, following a musician over one night in a legendary techno club, which turns into a rave odyssey.

results.title: My Coluche
results.overview: It’s the story of two guys — a comedian and a journalist — who become friends and get up to all sorts of antics. It’s the story of two men reflecting their era. It’s the story of one man, Coluche, seen through the eyes of his friend, Michel Denisot. It’s the story of his Coluche.

results.title: Mbappé, la diplomatie du ballon rond
results.original_title: Mbappé, la diplomatie du ballon rond

results.title: 3 Good Guys
results.overview: Three inseparable friends set off on what they believe will be a carefree adventure in Bangkok, only to be swept into a whirlwind of chaos that tests their friendship, love lives, and personal values.

results.title: Power to the People: John & Yoko Live in NYC
results.original_title: Power to the People: John & Yoko Live in NYC
results.overview: John & Yoko/Plastic Ono Band with Elephant's Memory and Special Guests performed these now-legendary sold-out One To One concerts to a combined audience of 40,000 people, raising over $1.5M for children with intellectual and developmental disabilities. They were the only full-length concerts John Lennon (with Yoko Ono) performed after leaving The Beatles.

results.title: 2026 TXT Moa Con in Japan: Live Viewing
results.original_title: 2026 TXT Moa Con in Japan: Live Viewing
results.overview: A special concert prepared exclusively for MOA to celebrate TOMORROW X TOGETHER's 7th  debut anniversary, [2026 TXT MOA CON]. Experience a powerful live band performance and special solos, showcasing each member’s unique talent.

results.title: The Monkey Hero
results.original_title: เห้งเจียแจ๊ส
results.overview: Once upon a time in a land far, far away, Tang Sanzang set out on a journey with Monkey King Jazz and Sha Wujing—However, one member was missing from their group: Zhu Baji.

results.title: The Currents
results.overview: At the height of her career, Lina, a 34-year-old Argentine stylist, is driven by a sudden impulse after an award ceremony in Switzerland. Back in Buenos Aires, she says nothing, but something in her has shifted – quiet and invisible, it subtly unravels a past she thought she had left behind.

results.title: Free Flow
results.overview: The story follows a young boy, Paelo, who spends his semestral  break in his home in Laguna. During his stay, an event in his  family unfolds and he’ll be forced to navigate his surroundings  through a child’s imagination–with his favorite Auntie, Mae.

results.title: My New Friends
results.overview: Police officer Lucie’s solitary daily life is disturbed by the arrival of a young couple and their little girl who move in next door. As she grows fond of them, she discovers that the father is an anti-police activist.

results.title: Nameless
results.overview: The story begins with an indiscriminate slaughter at a cafe frequented by young people. Security camera footage shows an unarmed man with shaven head, able to seemingly kill people with a simple touch. Police investigation leads to the suspected identity of the murderer: middle-aged man named Tarō Yamada. When the police conduct a search of his apartment, they find the rotting corpse of a woman.  Adapted from Sato Jiro's own debut manga.

results.title: The Knight of the Sorrowful Figure
results.original_title: The Knight of the Sorrowful Figure
results.overview: Don Quixote and Sancho Panza set forth on their quest in search of honor, chivalry, and legacy.

results.title: Something Still
results.overview: A heartbroken man returns to the home he shared with his ex-boyfriend, where visceral memories force him to confront the fissures that led to their parting: when the 'casual threesome' they planned evolved into something more.

results.title: Anyone lived in a pretty how town
results.original_title: Anyone lived in a pretty how town
results.overview: The late Dr. Jane Goodall narrates the titular poem by E.E. Cummings, in which a man named "anyone" and a woman named "no one" develop a profound love connection within their bucolic but increasingly alienated community.

results.title: Quem Tem com Que Me Pague, Não Me Deve Nada
results.original_title: Quem Tem com Que Me Pague, Não Me Deve Nada

results.title: Don't Leave the Kids Alone
results.original_title: No dejes a los niños solos
results.overview: A mother moves into a new house with her two children. One night she must leave the siblings home alone. What begins as a blast of carefree play soon turns into a claustrophobic horror story.

results.title: Samarasimha Reddy
results.overview: A man claims to be the long-lost brother of three sisters, returning to help improve their lives. His true identity, and the intention behind his scheme, is revealed in a Rayalaseema-set flashback.

results.title: Monument
results.overview: On America’s 250th anniversary, with attacks on libraries, archives, universities, and commemorative landmarks, the story of a nation’s history hangs in the balance. MONUMENT asks how looking and listening to one’s personal environment can help us understand our foundations. MONUMENT is centered on the history of Rhode Island, weaving statues, plaques, and place names together with the routine movements of everyday life.

results.title: Three Hits
results.overview: Once classmates Petar, Strahinja, and Lazar reunite for their prom anniversary and are forced to face old wounds during one turbulent night.

results.title: Kata Hati
results.overview: When celebrity actress Ayra Natasha's glamorous life unravels in one humiliating night - a red carpet disaster, a cheating boyfriend, and a viral disappearance, she finds herself in the back seat of a stranger's car, ugly-crying into a box of tissues. Her unlikely rescuer is Imran Firdaus, an e-hailing driver with nowhere particular to be and no reason to care… except that he does.  What begins as a forced arrangement - Imran hired as Ayra's personal driver to contain a tabloid storm slowly becomes the one real thing in both their lives. But Ayra belongs to a carefully constructed world of sponsors, film contracts, and a power couple narrative that her manager-sister Maya cannot afford to let fall apart.  Kata Hati is a Malay-language romantic comedy about the words we perform for the world, and the ones we only dare say to the ones we love.

results.title: Life Is
results.overview: Nora is about to turn 40 and can't stop wondering: what's the point of all this? What was meant to be a celebration turns into a series of unfortunate missteps that push her toward self-discovery. With open wounds, unspoken desires, and a burning past, Nora confronts her family history, death, unemployment, the collapse of her polyamorous relationship, and the urgent need to redefine love, her sexuality, and what she truly wants from life.

results.title: Es frisst
results.overview: After a botched robbery, a young gangster couple takes a mother and her daughter hostage and ends up in a forgotten forest cemetery on the edge of a disused industrial estate.

results.title: Dolores
results.overview: On the eve of her 65th birthday, Dolores has a premonition: her life is about to change. She will own a successful casino. However, her gambling addiction of the past may work against her. Deborah, her only daughter, waits for her boyfriend's release from prison to start a new life, whilst her granddaughter Duda clings to a chance of working in the United States. All three women will strive to make their dreams of a better life a reality, going for it all or nothing.

results.title: The Accompanist
results.overview: Emily accidentally tells her school nurse that her dementia-stricken grandpa almost got them killed, a rookie child-welfare agent is sent to their house to investigate. A botched extraction ensues and Emily is taken and placed with Sylvia, a new foster parent.

results.title: All the Lovers in the Night
results.original_title: すべて真夜中の恋人たち
results.overview: Freelance proofreader Fuyuko's carefully ordered life in solitude begins to transform after meeting Mitsutsuka, a quiet high school physics teacher.

results.title: The End of It
results.overview: In a near-future world where ageing can be cured and death is now optional, Claire, a former provocative artist approaching her 250th birthday, decides she’s had enough, she wants to die.

results.title: BZRK
results.overview: Anders’ rage is on the precipice of taking control, fearing he’ll succumb to his violent visions, he seeks the help of a psychiatrist whose mediation methods awaken a power within him.  Short film that screened at Chicago Horror Film Festival 2025. Won Best Horror Director.

results.title: The Big Trip 3: Race Around the World
results.overview: The heroes of the first part return and team up with the characters of the second part of the Big Trip franchise! But their enemies Python and Vulture are not asleep either! Where it all started, that's where it all ends! And our heroes will win as always!

results.title: The Remedy
results.overview: A troubled young man is the caregiver for both his terminally-ill mother and his mentally-ill sister. When he makes a desperate attempt to save his mom, he unleashes a supernatural entity that feeds on human flesh.

results.title: Qingtong & Kuihua
results.overview: In Damai Field Village, a city girl named Kui Hua lives with her artist father. One day, her father tragically dies in an accident caused by extreme weather, leaving Kui Hua an orphan. Although poor, a kind-hearted family takes her in，the family of a boy named Qing Tong . Growing up together as brother and sister, Qing Tong and Kui Hua care for and support each other through a time of material hardship.

results.title: The Revisionist
results.overview: Elise, a successful novelist, does what so many writers do: she manipulates and transforms the people in her life into the characters she needs for her story. As she blurs the line between fiction and reality, her world descends into secrets, lies, and outright betrayal.

results.title: The Match
results.overview: Film reconstructs the historic match Argentina vs England at the 1986 FIFA World Cup quarter-finals, famously remembered for the the hand of God goal by Maradona. Also exploring the sporting, political, and cultural dimensions of the encounter, in the background of the recent deadly Falklands War between the two countries.

results.title: The Voices of Our Mother
results.overview: When a family matriarch falls seriously ill, relatives gather and discover their shared ancestral ties bind them in unexpected ways.

results.title: Crooks
results.overview: Faye and Johnny rob a gangsters' poker den. Faye double crosses Johnny and takes off with the money and is soon pursued by the oldest and deadliest assassin in town. Worse still, Faye meets Blanche, a friendly but crazy waitress, at a truck stop.

results.title: The Narcissist's Playbook
results.overview: Five-country documentary with four self-aware malignant narcissists exposing their manipulation methods, victim accounts, and expert analysis of narcissistic abuse patterns to help viewers identify and defend against such behavior.

results.title: Perilous Passage: Birth in America
results.overview: A look at the impact of an already very precarious maternal health state in the U.S. post-rescinding of Roe v. Wade, via the Supreme Court's Dobbs decision, reversing rights that women have been working so hard to fight for, and that will actually have a deep impact that we can't even see just yet in terms of the numbers of mortality and trauma as a result of those very draconian policies.

results.title: Aimée & Samir
results.overview: Aimée de Jongh, a renowned comic-book illustrator, travels to Lesbos to conduct research for her new book about Samir, a fictional Syrian boy.

results.title: Death Boom
results.overview: As a “spiritual follow-up” to 'Fin', 'Death Boom' “pulls back the curtain on the catastrophic mental and environmental impacts of the contemporary death care industry. The film, shown through the lens of the workers at the heart of it as they prepare for the passing of 77 million baby boomers, exposes the toll that embalming, cremation, and traditional burial have on those who’ve passed, their families, and deathcare workers, and the corruption – political, religious, and corporate – that stands in opposition to greener methods being nationally legalized and accessible.”

results.title: AAA Noche de Los Grandes 2026 - Week 1
results.original_title: AAA Noche de Los Grandes 2026 - Week 1
results.overview: Noche de Los Grandes (Spanish for "Night of the Greats") was a professional wrestling event produced by the Mexican professional wrestling promotion Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide (AAA), in partnership with its parent company WWE. The event took place on Saturday, May 30, 2026, at Arena Monterrey in Monterrey, Nuevo León, Mexico.

results.title: Sleep Paralysis
results.overview: Under unbearable pressure, a young tennis star summons a djinn who begins to prey on people in their sleep, threatening the lives of her loved ones.

results.title: Inner Emigrants
results.overview: Three volunteer crisis-hotline psychologists struggle against Russia's totalitarian landscape, their patients’ emotional needs, and their own mental health.

results.title: Damned If You Do, Damned If You Don't
results.overview: A retired professor in his seventies enjoys a quiet, carefree life – until his daughter, amid a marital crisis, arrives with her two unruly children. As his peaceful routine unravels, he’s drawn into the chaos of family and unexpected emotions. Through this upheaval, he rediscovers the beauty and pain of love, and the deep human need to connect—despite the cost.

results.title: Thou Shall Not Commit Adultery
results.overview: When Cassie, a Christian feminist icon and bestselling author, is blackmailed with videos of her affair, she must fight to protect her brand and marriage. But as her trusted assistant's betrayal escalates, Cassie faces a terrifying choice.

results.title: Summer War
results.overview: The peaceful summer holiday of a US champion of the board game Third Reich is shattered when a tourist mysteriously disappears at sea.

results.title: Summer War
results.overview: The peaceful summer holiday of a US champion of the board game Third Reich is shattered when a tourist mysteriously disappears at sea.

results.title: Six Days in Spring
results.overview: Despite adversity, Sana wants her twins to have a spring vacation, but all her plans fall through. They secretly decide to stay in her former in-laws' villa on the Riviera, without telling anyone. Six days of sunshine that mark the end of innocence.

results.title: 9 Temples to Heaven
results.original_title: 9 วัด สู่สวรรค์
results.overview: A family of 9 takes their grandmother on a merit-making trip to 9 temples in 1 day, hoping to prolong her life. But the trip takes an unexpected turn.

results.title: Жертва на гнева
results.overview: An elite special forces operative is sent by Russian Intelligence to hunt down former teammates who have hijacked nuclear warheads.

results.title: Supertramp: Crime of the Century in Concert at Hammersmith Odeon 1975
results.original_title: Supertramp: Crime of the Century in Concert at Hammersmith Odeon 1975

results.title: Ethereal Torments
results.overview: In order to find balance between physical attractions, an obedient man stands before two deities.

results.title: 5 Bomoh
results.overview: Rashdan is a businessman who provides diving services. He has a wife, Sakinah and a daughter, Nisa. Rashdan has been a believer in the superstitious practices and superstitions of his ancestors since childhood, while Sakinah, a medical graduate, believes more in science and believes that as a Muslim, prayer is a powerful weapon in requesting anything he wants. When Nisa did not get 'straight A's in her SPM triak exam, Rashdan panicked because he really wanted his daughter to be the first in her family to study abroad. On the advice of his assistant, Alam, Rashdan forced Sakinah and Nisa to travel all over the country looking for the best amulets so that her daughter's SPM results would be excellent. Every shaman/dukun they met turned out to be a "scammer" shaman who actually only wanted to deceive them and not help Nisa's decision.

results.title: Runner
results.overview: Cris dedicates herself body and soul to athletics. While preparing for the 800-meter race at the Spanish National Championships, she suffers a severe psychotic break brought on by mounting pressure. As recovery unfolds, Cris keeps her eyes fixed on the track, holding on to the dream that has always defined.

results.title: Ocean Dreams
results.overview: The ocean is the blue heart of our planet and is essential for all forms of life, including our own. It regulates the climate, provides food, produces much of the air we breathe and is an endless source of enjoyment and inspiration. Ocean Dreams will take audiences on a global adventure to reveal the fascinating, and largely unexplored, world beneath the waves. From the deep fjords of Norway where orcas skillfully hunt schools of herring, to the vibrant waters of Raja Ampat in Indonesia home to the richest biodiversity on Earth. Dive with wolffish, the guardians of the kelp forest, as they use their powerful jaws to dine on sea urchins and enjoy the splendor of the rarely seen Bikini Atoll where marine life that disappeared after nuclear testing is thriving again. The oceans are being challenged, but in every corner of the globe are inspirational stories of resilience and recovery. When given a chance, the oceans can heal and dreams can become reality.

results.title: Penny in the Sky
results.overview: When a man contemplating his life decides to put his fate into a coin toss, he's interrupted by the sudden appearance of a woman there to end her life as well. Now they both find themselves at a crossroads, life and death decided by heads or tails.

results.title: Bulgakov. The Secret of The Master
results.overview: "Bulgakov. The Secret of the Master" examines a mystical connection that proves to be stronger than the author's original vision. The film shows how the immortal novel stopped being an author's text and began to dictate its will to the creator, interfering with his love, relationship with the authorities, and even bringing his fateful end closer. The viewer will see how fiction inexplicably turned into reality, and how the book's prophecies materialized in Bulgakov's own life, prompting the question: who really held the pen – the man or his immortal creation?

results.title: Under Suspicion: Kate McCann
results.overview: How Madeleine McCann's mother Kate came under suspicion to face police interrogation.

results.title: Fujiko
results.overview: Subjected to harsh treatment by her husband Jiro’s family, Fujiko is devastated when Mari is kidnapped by Jiro’s relatives. With the help of her own mother, Chiyo, Fujiko regains her child. Against the advice and judgment of those around her, she chooses to raise Mari as a single mother.

results.title: To the Tooth
results.overview: Artie is a young Italian chef who runs a bistro that used to be owned by her father. When the dead body of an ex-mafioso appears in the restaurant, Artie must re-evaluate her relationship with both L'Atessa and the people in it.

results.title: Imaginal Disk
results.overview: This film accompanying concept album 'Imaginal Disk' takes you on the journey of True on the path to becoming the "purest you". What soon unfolds is a cinematic, hypnotically beautiful quest to rediscover the essence of being a human.

results.title: Дени и Мэни. В кино!
results.overview: When Deni, a Labrador, lands a major advertising contract and moves in with his agent, Andrey, he and his cat friend, Manny, who are used to being together, find themselves separated for the first time. Immersed in the dazzling world of show business, Deni gradually realizes that no amount of success can replace family, and that sincerity is more valuable than any contract. Meanwhile, Andrey is going through a crisis in his relationship with his fiancée, and it is Deni who helps him rediscover his faith in love.

results.title: Maverick: The Epic Adventures of David Lean
results.original_title: Maverick: The Epic Adventures of David Lean
results.overview: Profiles the double Oscar winner, who helmed some of the most well-respected movies of all time, via never-before-seen archive and contributions from leading film directors. Haunted by the shadow of his dismissive father and his puritan upbringing, Lean was married six times, and he created layered and complex narratives in his work while struggling to find connection and meaning in his personal life.

results.title: Possessed
results.overview: Nut, a young nurse, returns to her hometown to care for her recovering mother, but she encounters a terrifying case that involves Mac, a boy who is believed to be possessed.

results.title: George Of Cappadocia
results.overview: After winning yet another battle, Jorge is decorated as the new captain of the army, and now finds himself faced with his greatest challenge, whether to be faithful to his faith or succumb to the excesses of Emperor Diocletian.

results.title: Collapse
results.overview: Shortly after October 7th 2023, Anat returns to what was once her home, wandering for over two years through a burned-down kibbutz and agricultural lands turned into fields of machines of destruction. Beyond the fence, Gaza is annihilated.

results.title: Mango Pachcha
results.overview: Set in Mysuru, a crime drama unfolds across a decade (2001-2011), following a chain of events that builds tension over time. The city's setting plays a key role in reflecting different phases across the years.

results.title: Mr. Nothing
results.overview: Mr. Nothing is a bitter fairy tale about two young men who meet on an app: one loves unreservedly, while the other seduces and destroys, incapable of opening up. Caught between illusion and fear, he chooses the void over love.

results.title: Night Shift
results.overview: A museum guard's night takes a deadly turn when criminals force her to aid a diamond heist in exchange for her husband's life.

results.title: La Tarara
results.overview: A symbolic short film exploring the relationship between an aunt and her nephew through a blend of fashion, visual arts, and cinematic storytelling. Part of the three-film "Where Talent Ignites" project showcasing Spanish creativity.

results.title: She Keeps Me Young
results.overview: Michelle is floating through life until a surprising connection with a high schooler challenges her friendship with her overbearing best friend, in this bitingly astute and exceptionally hilarious satire.

results.title: How To Hide It
results.overview: A moment of weakness after a humiliating breakup leads Zahra, a young Muslim woman to play a forbidden lottery ticket. Her chance at escape becomes a spiritual crisis. While her coworker dreams of riches, she’s certain Allah is watching and waiting.

results.title: Dolphin Boy 2
results.overview: The heroic deeds of the dolphin boy made him a legend among the sea creatures and the inhabitants of the island, but despite his fame, he feels lonely, because everyone around him expects only new achievements from him, and he has almost no real friends. In addition, he still does not know the story of his origin, even his real name is a mystery to the boy. The sudden appearance of huge whales and evil crabs in the sea strikes fear into the hearts of the islanders and sea creatures. Fate throws a new challenge to the dolphin boy, but at the same time gives him hope.

results.title: Bamse and the Secret of The Sea
results.overview: Bamse, Little Skutt and Skalman go out into open water and far down to the bottom of the sea. And Captain Buster is willing to do anything to earn the title of Terror of the Sea.

results.title: 猪猪侠大电影之竞速小英雄
results.original_title: 猪猪侠大电影之竞速小英雄

results.title: Shark Thrash
results.overview: A small and touristy beachside town is hit by a storm the size of which nobody could have predicted. A family who just arrived tries to escape, but gets stuck in the quickly rising waters. They try to figure a way out with the help of some locals, but any progress is shut down when the sharks make their way onto the flooded streets. The family and locals must now find a way to survive as the waters rise.

results.title: Let's Love
results.overview: When a director, actor, screenwriter and actress reunite for the 10th Anniversary of their one-hit wonder film for a convention that suddenly gets cancelled, they must improvise and come up with ideas for a sequel while in rural Wales.

results.title: Stargazers
results.overview: Best friends Jack and Benji race to uncover the mystery of the strange signals transmitting from their town. Could it be proof of Aliens living on Earth? They have three days to find out or risk being split up forever.

results.title: Rosen und Reis
results.overview: In the middle of Maike's sister Inka's wedding preparations, the marital dispute between Sören and Maike is still simmering because she has been cheating. Maike suggests that Sören should have a fling himself so that peace can finally be restored. With whomever! But Sören ends up in bed with Maike's best friend Doris, of all people. Dirk, Doris' husband, is not the only one fuming with rage and wants to give Sören a thrashing. Maike in particular reproaches Sören: the offer was never meant to be like that! And in the midst of all the chaos, Inka decides to throw the stuffy wedding, which groom Nils only wants to go ahead with for the sake of his conservative mother Renate. So: no wedding and three break-ups?

results.title: They Fight
results.overview: Reformed ex-convict Walt Manigan returns home to rebuild his family with the love of his life, Ketta. His path leads him to a boxing gym inside a D.C. youth recreation center about to be closed. There, he works under the wise coach Slim to mentor a group of boys to train for the junior national boxing tournament, all leading to a showdown between best friends Quincey and Peanut as they battle for a spot on the U.S. Junior Olympic Team.

results.title: White Sun
results.overview: Young Pooja lives with her mother in a village in Nepal. Though saddened by the death of her grandfather, she is secretly thrilled at the prospect of meeting the man she hopes may be her father — Chandra, a former Maoist guerrilla who is returning home after a decade-long civil conflict.

results.title: Dose
results.overview: A doctor uncovers a suspicious death at his hospital, unraveling secrets and lies. Joined by a haunted investigator, their search for truth becomes a deadly fight for survival.

results.title: Mistura
results.overview: A prejudiced Franco-Peruvian woman opens a restaurant after her husband leaves her for another woman. Through it, she falls in love with the gastronomic and cultural diversity of Peru during the prosperous but troubled Lima of 1965.

results.title: My CEO Thinks I’m a Robot
results.original_title: My CEO Thinks I’m a Robot
results.overview: Angela Muji teams up with acclaimed actor Carlo Aquino in a quirky rom-com where an AI developer pretends to be a robot for her longtime crush and CEO. Expect kilig, chaos, and a surprising chemistry you won't see coming.

results.title: Mi Amor
results.overview: Romy is a French DJ touring the sun-bleached and club-lit Canary Islands, until her friend vanishes. Met with evasion from locals and the authorities, her search leads her to a magnetic stranger and the sinister proprietors of an exotic animal sanctuary.

results.title: Medusa
results.overview: Poseidon demands Medusa’s submission. Hoping to protect her, her sisters send her to live with the priestesses of Athena’s temple. But the god of the sea emerges from the waves and rapes the young woman, defiling the temple. To punish her for this desecration, Athena turns Medusa into a monstrous creature: her hair becomes a nest of snakes and her gaze turns anyone who looks at her to stone. This terrifying power arouses the lust of heroes, who pursue her in her exile…

results.title: A Weapon in My Heart
results.overview: A detective and his partner track down a call girl with information about a drug cartel. After taking her into custody, they are attacked by cartel members. The detective and the woman manage to escape, but they are soon hounded by a professional hitman hired to eliminate them and recover the heroin stolen by the woman.

results.title: Throuple
results.overview: Michael, a lonely gay singer-songwriter terrified of pursuing his musical dreams and exploring romantic intimacy, relies on his best friend and her girlfriend for support and affection. However, when he meets a newly open married couple seeking a casual encounter, the three men enter into a relationship that is more vulnerable than any of them ever expected.

results.title: Background Action
results.overview: On a tense set of a film noir, two background actors quietly form a connection take after take

results.title: Hope
results.overview: After doom-scrolling on social media, a young poet named Salome Agbaroji is thrust into a fantastic journey through a magical animated realm, where she encounters a majestic Black Crowned Crane.

results.title: The Warmth of Dance
results.overview: A famous TV host, who grew up without parents and with a painful past, sees his brilliant career and power called into question during a train journey from Rome to Milan.

results.title: The Python Hunt
results.overview: Every year, the Florida government invites the general public to compete in an invasive python removal contest in the Everglades. For ten nights, an eclectic group of hunters confront the dangerous terrain, nocturnal creatures and their own desires.

results.title: The Prompt
results.overview: 'The Prompt' takes an everyday tool for some and twists it into a dystopian, inescapable nightmare...

results.title: Anjali
results.overview: A man's emotional & psychological breakdown caused by a toxic relationship descends into chaos, panic, and mayhem when every attempt to end it fails.

results.title: Chirag Panjwani: Dr. Panjwani
results.overview: A stand up comedy special about Chirag's father and his father's bravery.

results.title: I Probably Am a Lonely One
results.original_title: I Probably Am a Lonely One
results.overview: A wife tries to find some kind of connection with her husband, Edward, to no avail.

results.title: Fire, Water, Earth, Air
results.overview: Four stories from the Nordic region paint a picture of a changing natural world, where the elements rage and where being prepared proves to be much more than sandbags and fire extinguishers.

results.title: Defending Europe
results.overview: For decades, European security has depended mainly on NATO, under-written by America. But under the Trump White House, the spectre of US disengagement threatens to leave the EU without its protector. We investigate the main threats facing Europe and examine how Europe can best defend itself.

results.title: Golden Bullet
results.overview: A crime thriller story set in Serbia.

results.title: BLOOD INCANTATION - All Gates Open: In Search of Absolute Elsewhere
results.original_title: BLOOD INCANTATION - All Gates Open: In Search of Absolute Elsewhere
results.overview: The film tells the story of Blood Incantation’s time in Berlin during the summer of 2023, recording “Absolute Elsewhere” at the legendary Hansa Studios.

results.title: BLOOD INCANTATION - All Gates Open: In Search of Absolute Elsewhere
results.original_title: BLOOD INCANTATION - All Gates Open: In Search of Absolute Elsewhere
results.overview: The film tells the story of Blood Incantation’s time in Berlin during the summer of 2023, recording “Absolute Elsewhere” at the legendary Hansa Studios.

results.title: Kyoto Hippocrates
results.original_title: 幕末ヒポクラテスたち
results.overview: In the late Edo period, when traditional Chinese medicine (Kampo) was mainstream, a Dutch-style Western doctor, Taikichi, devoted himself to treating poor villagers. After saving the life of a rough young man, Shinzaburō, through surgery, the man turned his life around and began training to become a doctor himself. Fifteen years later, having studied the latest medical science in Nagasaki, Shinzaburō returns and joins Taikichi in confronting a suspected outbreak of typhoid fever. Set against the backdrop of a time when Kampo and Western medicine competed for legitimacy, this moving historical drama follows the struggles of doctors who risked everything to save lives during Japan’s medical awakening.

results.title: Mineshaft: The Cruising Murders
results.overview: “Mineshaft: The Cruising Murders" peels back the layers of controversy surrounding the making of the 1980 thriller, "Cruising." Directed by William Friedkin, the film triggered fierce protests from the LGBTQ+ community for its portrayal of a serial killer targeting gay men in New York's leather bars. Friedkin drew inspiration from the brutal murder of Variety reporter Addison Verrill, blurring the boundaries between cinematic fiction and real-life tragedy.

results.title: Mongrels
results.overview: In 1991, a grieving Korean family immigrate to the Canadian prairies to help cull the troubling population of feral dogs, but must confront their own personal trials and tribulations.

results.title: Wanted
results.overview: Hyun-jun, an ordinary postman, is mistakenly arrested as a wanted criminal due to his identical appearance to fugitive Choi Cheol-gu. While struggling to prove his innocence, the real Cheol-gu escapes prison and flees to Taiwan. When Hyun-jun travels there on a reward trip, he is once again mistaken for the criminal and even kidnapped, only to be rescued by tough detective Woo-hee and her partner. As repeated mix-ups lead to comedic chaos, Hyun-jun and Woo-hee grow closer and ultimately team up to catch the real fugitive together.

results.title: Good Omens - Season 3: An Ineffable Goodbye
results.original_title: Good Omens - Season 3: An Ineffable Goodbye
results.overview: Take a look behind the scenes of the finale. Hear from Michael Sheen and David Tennant on their journey, celebrating the fans and all involved, with an ineffable goodbye.

results.title: Where Time Lingers
results.overview: A woman's daily routine is upended when she finds a reminder of times she'd repressed.

results.title: My Plastic Mother
results.overview: Eki, living by the landfill, searches for a memento to honor his late mother. Battling the relentless rain, landslides, and looming threats from scavengers and machinery, he fears her memory could be lost beneath the waste forever.

results.title: All's Fair in Love and Mahjong
results.original_title: All's Fair in Love and Mahjong
results.overview: Ronni is living a full life as a school nurse and mom, hosting a longtime mahjong game with her best friends Shelley, Carly, and Melissa. But when her daughter leaves for college, everything shifts at once. Her hours get cut. Her ex is pushing to sell the home she loves. And suddenly she's staring down an empty nest wondering what comes next.

results.title: Bon Cop, Bad Cop : histoire de familles
results.original_title: Bon Cop, Bad Cop : histoire de familles

results.title: Torino Shadow
results.overview: A woman travels from southern China to Turin, Italy, to see her husband. But an unexpected departure leaves her to find herself again, and to find cinema.

results.title: Rain Reign
results.overview: Rose Howard, a neurodivergent 12-year-old girl raised by her volatile single father, is forced to abandon her daily routines when a superstorm devastates their town and her beloved dog, Rain, goes missing. With the support of her uncle, Rose embarks on a determined search for Rain — a journey that challenges her resilience and compels her to make an impossible choice between her own needs and doing what is right.

results.title: Unexpected Courage
results.overview: Senior talent manager Le-Fu and commercial director Po-En have been in love for years. Due to their age gap and traumas from original families, neither has been willing to commit to the relationship, until a big surprise hits Love on her 45-year-old birthday and both of them are forced to decide on what their future will be.

results.title: Portuguese Love
results.overview: During a company event, Yasemin, the successful PR manager, learns that her fiancee Yaman has been unfaithful to her. She faces a cathartic choice: continue living a lie or leave everything behind. On an instinct, she jumps on the first plane she finds and ends up in Lisbon. However upon arrival, her suitcase is lost, her credit cards are blocked, and she has nowhere to stay. Drifting toward a small seaside town, a sweet surprise awaits Yasemin: she must share the rental stone house with the owner, José. What begins as a clash of opposites turns into love. As a perfectionist and meticulous person, Yasemin confronts her fears to rediscover what truly matters: new beginnings, and gaining back the self-confidence she once had.

results.title: Rabbit Gnaw
results.overview: After a brief encounter with an enigmatic woman, a voyeuristic illustrator finds himself lost in an endless rabbit hole of uncanny coincidences and forgotten memories, unable to shake the strange feeling that she strikingly resembles a missing woman from his hometown.

results.title: The Tagammou Killer
results.overview: In a setting of crime and thriller, the movie tells the story of a serial killer named Karim, who grew up alone searching for his identity and found it in rebelling against his family. Years later, he begins a relationship with a beautiful girl and starts a series of murders targeting a number of women.

results.title: Memory of Princess Mumbi
results.overview: In 2093, filmmaker Kuve travels to Umata to document the aftermath of a war that revived ancient kingdoms. There, he meets Mumbi, who challenges him to make his film without the use of AI. As Kuve searches for his own voice, he begins to realize that even in a broken world, beauty can be found in the small human moments we often overlook.

results.title: Gregg Allman: The Music of My Soul
results.original_title: Gregg Allman: The Music of My Soul
results.overview: This visionary music documentary traces the turbulent, transcendent life of Gregg Allman — from a childhood ruptured by his father’s murder to the soulful emergence that reshaped American music. Through archival recordings, candid interviews, and electric performances, the film follows Gregg’s musical awakening amid the blues he worshipped, the creation of the Allman Brothers Band with his brother.

results.title: Krishna Aur Chitthi
results.overview: What happens when the "God of Cricket" and the Lord of the Universe reside under the same roof? Krishna Aur Chitthi is a soul-stirring family drama that explores the thin line between fandom and faith, proving that when an intention is pure, every prayer, whether addressed to Vaikuntha or Wankhede, reaches the same destination

results.title: Threadbare
results.overview: A boy crowns himself as king, unaware his kingdom is already losing someone.

results.title: Best Served Cold: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
results.original_title: Best Served Cold: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
results.overview: When a suspect in a forgery case is murdered and the prosecutor goes missing, Hannah and Chad must uncover how the two cases are connected and solve them in time for the trial.

results.title: Finnegan's Foursome
results.overview: Two middle aged brothers and their respective sons travel to Ireland to play the Finnegan Family's annual golf outing, where they distribute the ashes of the family patriarch

results.title: Bromance Kadhal
results.overview: In a swipe-right generation, an unromantic boy dares to love the old-school way and proves that staying real is the boldest move of all.

results.title: Prank Night
results.overview: A young woman seeks revenge on the group of thugs that attacked her family.

results.title: The Curse of Snake Valley
results.overview: The trio of adventurous pals, a man who is a scientist, a fine lady and a former military pilot are in the Indochina jungles looking for some mysterious vase that holds a metal container that is of no mundane origin.

results.title: Never Fade
results.overview: Never Fade is a multi-dimensional creative project led by Thai actress Yoko Apasra Lertprasert, best known for her role in the Girls' Love (GL) series Blank. It serves as a personal brand and production house launched after her departure from NineStar Studios. The film is expected to explore emotional themes of resilience.

results.title: Okanjuwa
results.overview: The romantic comedy follows Soluchi, a hopeless romantic still healing from being jilted by her former lover, Kalu. When a regular work call puts her in touch with the charming Eli, Soluchi begins to see the possibility of the love story she has always wanted.

results.title: Homecoming
results.overview: The story of a boy who, after being forced to leave Ukraine due to the Russian invasion, returns home to Zaporizhzhia through his mechanical avatar — a robotic dog he controls from his room in Poland.

results.title: An Autumn Summer
results.overview: Kevin and his girlfriend, Cody, are two months into his family's annual trip at their Northern Michigan home. Amid peaceful days and adventurous nights, Kevin and Cody awaken to reality: This time together will eventually end, and each moment may become a fleeting memory.

results.title: Deadbeat Boyfriend
results.overview: Ana is a college student with a dark secret: her boyfriend is a zombie. After his tragic death 3 months prior, she used ancient magic to reanimate his body. But as the relationship decays and a love between Ana and her roommate grows, Ana must choose: stay in a dead relationship, or take a chance on the living?

results.title: Fault
results.overview: An elite tennis star’s reunion with her estranged sister explodes into a battle over buried trauma, threatening her career and her sanity on the eve of the U.S. Open.

results.title: Kanaval
results.overview: In the mid-1970s, Rico, a 9-year-old Haitian boy, was brutally torn from his native land  along with Erzulie, his mother, to a strange planet called Canada. Since their arrival, a  distance seems to have grown between mother and son. To regain the love of his mother, Rico will have to understand this New World populated by individuals with strange habits  and customs. Fortunately for him, he can count on Kana, his imaginary friend who comes  straight out of Haitian mythology.

results.title: Shape of Momo
results.overview: Bishnu returns to her Himalayan village after quitting her job, only to face mounting family pressures and societal expectations. As tensions rise with her pregnant sister's arrival and a budding relationship with a "suitable" boy from her community, Bishnu must choose between conforming to tradition or claiming her independence.

results.title: Future Science - Das Ende der Tierversuche?
results.original_title: Future Science - Das Ende der Tierversuche?
results.overview: In the departure from animal testing, visionary researchers are redefining medicine with AI and artificial organs, but their greatest obstacle isn't disease—it's the scientific establishment that created them.

results.title: Baapya
results.overview: In coastal Konkan, an ordinary family and their tight-knit town face change, identity, and buried emotions when an unexpected return from the past upends their settled lives.

results.title: Everyone Has Something to Hide
results.overview: Kathy is shocked when she finds out her son Noah's former best friend Ethan has been murdered. She's even more shocked when her straight-A son is the prime suspect. Kathy fights to clear her son's name.

results.title: Mera Lyari
results.overview: A story resilience, identity and the courage to rise, even when the odds are stacked against you.

results.title: Eliminate Criminals
results.overview: In 1995, in the city of Jixiong in northeastern China, two robbers wearing burlap sack masks killed many people and committed a robbery.  Everyone at the scene was killed. The cruelty of the crime left the entire city in shock. The police station director ordered the criminal police captain, Zhang Jian, to investigate the case.  Jiang Hongbing, who had retired from the martial arts world for many years, decided to team up with Captain Zhang Jian to avenge his fallen comrade. As a result of the killer's meticulousness, what difficulties will they face in tracking down the case, and how will they uncover the clues to solve it?

results.title: The Wedding Entertainer (The Tale of Moishe Badhan)
results.original_title: The Wedding Entertainer (The Tale of Moishe Badhan)
results.overview: Jerusalem's greatest badchan (Hasidic wedding comedian), wrecked his career because of liquor and a big mouth, gets a second chance as the sidekick of the famous American Badchan Meshulam. At the wedding, everything spins out of control.

results.title: Aquí
results.overview: In a new land where everyone receives a new name and begins again without a past, Simón takes responsibility for David, a child he met on the crossing to a new life. Driven by an inexplicable conviction, he sets out to find the boy’s mother despite the fact David remembers nothing about her. When he recognizes Inés as the right woman, she accepts the role and an unlikely bond forms between them. While society imposes rules and treats difference as a threat, David resists being shaped and stands for imagination and freedom.

results.title: Tomorrow Is a Long Time
results.overview: Life is not the most fulfilling for sixteen-year-old Meng: Lounging at home with his grieving father on a daily basis, being excluded from his family’s past, and forced into bullying other kids at school. Everything changes when he is thrown into a life-altering adventure that propels him into an exciting unfamiliar landscape.

results.title: Karma
results.overview: In Korea, a "Beommusa" is a licensed legal practitioner who prepares court documents for people in crisis. In a Beommusa's office, A father aids debtors yet is indebted himself. Eight years ago, fearing that debt might one day destroy his father, the director became his assistant to help repay what was owed. This film traces debt-born pain, seeking dissolution.

results.title: Finnick 2
results.overview: Finnick accidentally loses invisibility, and now the world of brownies is under threat. Together with his man Kristina, he goes in search of a magical magician who will help him regain invisibility.

results.title: Bob and David Climb Machu Picchu
results.original_title: Bob and David Climb Machu Picchu
results.overview: Comedy legends Bob Odenkirk and David Cross tackle one of the world's toughest hikes — and each other — in this high-altitude, coca-fueled meditation on friendship, mortality, and profoundly absurd comedy from two icons still magnificently in sync.

results.title: Mare's Nest
results.overview: Moon travels through a mysterious unexplained world free of adults. Moon meets a scholar turned sage and her translator in a mountain hut, where she tries to understand what is happening, based on a play by Don DeLillo. She meets many others who perform for her, show her a film, give her gifts, show her different possibilities for living. She observes and moves on into an unknown future.

results.title: Snorp: My Alien Friend 2
results.overview: Continuation of the adventures of the alien, sequel to the film "Zhdun".

results.title: Just One More
results.overview: A recovering addict, Jess, meets Charles, a dying man praying God will use him "just one more" time. As their lives collide, Jess battles shame, and doubt-discovering faith, forgiveness, and the hope to fight for a future beyond addiction.

results.title: ONE OK ROCK DETOX JAPAN TOUR AT NISSAN STADIUM 2025 IN CINEMAS
results.original_title: ONE OK ROCK DETOX JAPAN TOUR AT NISSAN STADIUM 2025 IN CINEMAS
results.overview: ONE OK ROCK DETOX JAPAN TOUR 2025 AT NISSAN STADIUM IN CINEMAS unleashes the raw pulse of a career-defining night—documenting the band's commanding takeover of Japan's iconic Nissan Stadium—where thunderous riffs, soaring vocals, and 70,000 voices collide into something electric, forging an unbreakable bond between the band and their worldwide legion of fans.

results.title: Sundown Syndrome
results.overview: A homeless eats a strange biscuit and begins to hallucinate; everything around him becomes an evil space.

results.title: Variations on a Theme
results.overview: An elderly goat herder falls victim to a scam promising long-awaited reparations for her father's WWII service. Structured as a series of recurring visual 'variations', Variations on a Theme is a portrait of endurance and loss.

results.title: 100 Dates in Dallas
results.overview: A forty-something former actor navigates online dating in Dallas.

results.title: 100 Dates in Dallas
results.overview: A forty-something former actor navigates online dating in Dallas.

results.title: Girls und Panzer: Motto Love Love Sakusen Desu! Act 4
results.original_title: ガールズ＆パンツァー　もっとらぶらぶ作戦です！　第4幕
results.overview: Part 4 of Girls und Panzer spin-off series.

results.title: James: Getting Away with It
results.overview: The first-ever authorised tell-all documentary about iconic British band James.

results.title: A Wolf Among the Swans
results.overview: Thiago Soares is a young man from the suburbs of Rio de Janeiro who leaves hip hop behind and embarks on the world of classical ballet. His story takes on unexpected turns through his troubled relationship with his mentor, the Cuban Dino Carrera, who improves Thiago's talent until he reaches stardom by becoming the principal dancer of the Royal Ballet in London.

results.title: Ink Between the Lines
results.overview: After the devastating suicide of her best friend Coli, 15 year old Natalie turns to journaling to cope with her overwhelming grief. Struggling with guilt and isolation, she pours her emotions onto the page and joins a support group for teens. A deep conversation with Ezra, a friend who understands silent pain, inspires her to transform her journal entries into a novel. As Natalie writes, she begins to confront hidden truths about her friendship with Coli, unspoken struggles, and the weight of what was left unsaid. Through storytelling, she finds healing, connection, and the courage to speak the truth—not just for herself, but for others who need to hear it.

results.title: Café Chairel
results.overview: Two lonely people cross paths while working in a coffee shop. Even with opposite personalities, they both want to move forward with the business which they use as a conduit to heal their wounds, even though they know nothing about coffee.

results.title: The Portal
results.overview: An assistant of a CEO goes on a dangerous journey to save the multiverse after his company fails to showcase a prototype of their revolutionary invention - the Portal.

results.title: Human Theories
results.overview: Through forty interconnected vignettes, Human Theories is a comedic kaleidoscope exploring how people try, and often fail, to connect with one another in this weird world. Filmed over a year on location in New York City with a diverse ensemble cast of over 50 actors and non-actors, the film is an experimental love letter to the awkward struggle of modern city living.

results.title: Mallorca confidencial
results.overview: Mallorca, 2007. La Chusa, the matriarch of a shantytown, runs the drug market with the support of neighbors, traffickers, and police. But when she suffers a massive robbery, she sees her power and her family shaken.

results.title: Funfair
results.overview: A young woman struggles with her aching wisdom tooth and the challenges of adulthood. Her inner struggles come to life in a surreal amusement park where she unexpectedly stumbles one day. This inner journey shakes her out of her daily anxiety and helps her embark on a journey towards more conscious self-care.

results.title: Caity
results.overview: Along with her newly sober father Paul, 16-year-old Caity prepares for the new Halloween season of their family-owned haunted house. When she recognizes signs of a relapse from Paul, she tries to cover them up but struggles to manage as she tests her own relationship to substances and an attraction to new employee Hannah.

results.title: APART
results.overview: In apartheid South Africa, a forbidden friendship between two boys is tested by a life-saving act that forces them to confront the hate dividing their world.

results.title: The Rule Breaker
results.overview: Is it ‘rule breaking’ for Korean society to encourage childbirth while leaving childcare to individuals? Is it ‘rule breaking’ for a family where the father works low-wage irregular jobs and serves as a stay-at-home dad to four children? To resist Korean society's rule breaking, this stay-at-home father of four decides to become the so-called "Rule Breaker."​

results.title: Kidnapped in Her Own Home: The Martha Carelli Story
results.original_title: Kidnapped in Her Own Home: The Martha Carelli Story
results.overview: Follows Martha Carelli whose life is shattered when an escaped convict takes her hostage and forces her to drive his getaway car. She must outwit her increasingly volatile captor to survive.

results.title: No Sex
results.overview: A college girl must navigate her unspoken feelings for her best friend — and race to protect her — when a drunken night spirals out of control.

results.title: Love, Layla De Jesus
results.original_title: Ang Pagmamahal ni Layla De Jesus
results.overview: Working in an old antique shop, a reserved young woman begins experiencing strange happenings—until, one night during a storm, a stranger makes her acquaintance

results.title: Tutti Frutti
results.overview: How are you doing, Céline Sciamma?

results.title: Appropriate Purposes
results.overview: Having to deal with a terrible boss, librarian Bia receives some unexpected help to put everything back in its place.

results.title: A Messy Tribute to Motherly Love
results.overview: When people literally explode from emotional overload, grief is just the beginning. A wildly surrealist charade in which a bereaved man, his friend and mother spiral through village life.

results.title: Burrow
results.overview: A year after the death of her brother, a young woman joins her friends on a drug-infused getaway that spirals into a night of horror when an alien insect burrows into one of her friends, transforming him into a vicious man-eating creature.

results.title: Tummy Tom and the Lost Teddybear
results.original_title: Dikkie Dik en de verdwenen knuffel
results.overview: Tummy Tom’s favourite toy is Bear. One evening, when Tummy Tom is sleeping, Bear goes missing. Tummy Tom and his best friend Cat Mouse start looking in and around the house. But in order to find Bear, they decide to leave their garden and discover a new world with new friends. Together, they manage to find Bear.

results.title: When I Said I Do
results.overview: Ali Corley is a widowed search-and-rescue K-9 handler who rebuilt her life after losing her husband in the line of duty. When she meets seasoned rescue specialist Shawn Willis, their connection forces them both to confront the true meaning of commitment.

results.title: Кассандра
results.overview: A young woman, grappling with a devastating loss, wakes up each night feeling increasingly drained—as if someone were siphoning away her strength. In search of salvation, she travels to a seer living high in the mountains, where she discovers that she has fallen victim to an Albasty—an ancient, malevolent spirit that preys upon those broken by grief and unable to let go of the past. It assumes the guise of a person's deepest fear, gradually destroying them from within.

results.title: Long Ago
results.overview: A story of long, long ago. When the world was just beginning.

results.title: Lisa Ann Walter: It Was an Accident
results.original_title: Lisa Ann Walter: It Was an Accident
results.overview: Lisa Ann Walter's long-awaited debut comedy special takes on feral Gen-Xers, self-loathing, and navigating a backsliding America, via the no-filter lens of a grown-ass woman who has been paying attention.

results.title: Ninja Wars - BlackFox vs Shogun's Ninja
results.original_title: Ninja Wars - BlackFox vs Shogun's Ninja
results.overview: Rikka Isurugi (Chihiro Yamamoto), head of the Fox Clan, is investigating the "White Lotus," a mysterious cult suspected of plotting a rebellion against the Shogunate. During her mission, she encounters Okyo (Kanon Miyahara), a Fuma Ninja dispatched by the Shogun. Their paths converge as they face a formidable common enemy: the Iga Ninja clan, led by Hattori Hanzo (Kane Kosugi), who harbors a deep vengeance against the Tokugawa family. A three-way conflict between the Fox Clan, Fuma Ninja, and Iga Ninja is about to begin.

results.title: The Light That Remains
results.overview: An astronaut, Julian, grieving the recent loss of his wife, is selected by Auron Astronautics for the Aether I mission to test the atmosphere after a devastating coronal mass ejection.

results.title: Saturday Night's Main Event XLIV
results.overview: Saturday Night's Main Event XLIV will take place on May 23, 2026, from Fort Wayne, Indiana at Allen County War Memorial Coliseum. It will be the first WWE televised event in Fort Wayne since 2014.

results.title: Goodbye, My Loved Ones!
results.original_title: お終活3 幸春！人生メモリーズ
results.overview: A bride-to-be’s careless remark sparks chaos between two families, putting her wedding in jeopardy.

results.title: Reflections
results.overview: A synchronized swimming coach and her daughter prepare for an important performance as the girl struggles more and more under the mounting pressure. When the coach's ex-husband, the club president, asks for their daughter to step back, it becomes clear how far they are willing to go for their dreams.

results.title: Authentic Games - In the Disconnected Empire
results.overview: After years of ruling an offline world, the Disconnected Empire decides to take revenge. The Emperor plans to kidnap Marco Túlio, creator of Authentic Games, to bring joy to his dark kingdom. Upon entering this universe, Marco Túlio transforms into Authentic, a friendly character, and embarks on a great adventure to rescue the Craft Family and face the Empire. When all seems lost, unexpected help appears in the final confrontation.

results.title: Twisted Retreat
results.overview: Four friends on a weekend retreat unravel secrets, sparking tension and betrayal. A game of Truth or Dare turns sinister as an unseen killer stalks them. Paranoia rises, trust shatters, and one by one, they fall—until a shocking truth changes everything.

results.title: Hostage
results.overview: When a routine cleanup goes wrong, three lifelong friends working for a ruthless crime syndicate must outwit their own boss after realizing they've accidentally killed the one man they were ordered to keep alive.

results.title: The Great Ambition
results.overview: Secretary of the most influential Communist Party in the Western world, Enrico Berlinguer challenged the international balance by seeking to bring the Communists to government in Italy and achieve socialism in a democratic country. From 1973, when he escaped an attack by the Bulgarian secret services, to the assassination of his main ally Aldo Moro in 1978, not forgetting his trips to Moscow and the covers of Time: the story of a man who wanted to change the world, but failed.

results.title: Be with You
results.overview: A high school dropout and delinquent, Jie, falls in love with a quiet, speech-impaired high school girl, Guang, leading to a story of mutual growth and healing.

results.title: Killer Curve
results.overview: After her brother is murdered, Jade Carter uncovers a secret list linking powerful elites to a deadly conspiracy. As corrupt forces close in, she must outsmart both criminals and law enforcement to expose the truth - and survive long enough to get revenge.

results.title: La Perra
results.overview: On a remote, wind-lashed island off the Chilean coast, Silvia earns her living harvesting  seaweed and shares a quiet life with her partner. When she adopts a stray puppy, Yuri, her days fill with joy, love, and a tenderness that stirs a long-suppressed longing for motherhood. But Yuri’s sudden disappearance reawakens a haunting childhood trauma, forcing Silvia to confront a past she has never truly left behind.

results.title: Halcyon Days
results.overview: A troubled actor returns home to visit his ailing mother, only to discover his life has inexplicably turned into a sitcom.

results.title: The Crow
results.overview: After Eric Dravens and his fiancee, Shelly Webster, get brutally murdered by gangsters, Eric returns as Death's emissary to avenge his beloved and himself.

results.title: Panelstory or Birth of a Community
results.original_title: Panelstory aneb Jak se rodí sídliště
results.overview: An old man is wandering round a badly signposted and as yet mostly under construction Prague housing estate looking for the high rise block into which he is supposed to be moving with his daughter's family. The old granddad from the countryside likes chatting, nothing escapes his eyes and he wants to give everyone a helping hand.

results.title: CASE 0 : TOMORROW
results.overview: In an abandoned, timeless government archive, an unprecedented case is opened: the trial of "The Future" on charges of existential fraud against humanity through a perpetual, unfulfilled promise—only for investigators to discover that the accused might have never existed at all.

results.title: Maps
results.overview: Julia and Sérgio set out in search of Rebeca, a missing cycling activist, moving through Brasília, a city marked by silence and unresolved histories. Their investigation leads them to forgotten tragedies, where ruins, memories, and unsettling presences begin to intertwine. Blurring the line between the real and the fantastic, Mapas unfolds as a journey through ghosts of the past that continue to echo in the present.

results.title: Taanu Nenu
results.overview: Kishore, a slightly dyslexic young lad, finds his long-lost love (Kriti) through a mischievous act done by his younger sister(Siri). The act translates into a date with the girl he once adored as a child. What follows next is a sequence of events that finally leads him to win over the love of his life.

results.title: Exception culturelle, la bataille qui a sauvé le cinéma français
results.original_title: Exception culturelle, la bataille qui a sauvé le cinéma français

results.title: CRASHOUT
results.overview: A chaotic metal drummer screams heaps and gets into lots of fights.

results.title: Boleiros: Era uma Vez o Futebol...
results.original_title: Boleiros: Era uma Vez o Futebol...
results.overview: Tribute to the world of soccer in Brazil. Group of ex-soccer players gather in a bar in São Paulo to remember old stories of their prime.

results.title: Irish Goodbye
results.overview: KNEECAP ft. KAE TEMPEST - IRISH GOODBYE

results.title: Motive For Murder (M4M)
results.overview: A serial killer in Hyderabad recreates famous paintings using human victims, sparking a high-stakes pursuit by a determined detective and an ambitious journalist. As the killer’s psychological games blur the lines between reality and art, they must uncover a dark connection to a local college before the next "exhibit" is revealed.

results.title: Mambembe
results.overview: Ruy, a solitary surveyor, travels the harsh Pernambuco. His life is transformed when he meets three women from a mambembe circus, Madrinha, Jéssica and Diadorim. Through the history of these four characters, "Mambembe" deals with chance while reflecting on artistic construction.

results.title: The Fatigued
results.overview: Liuba and Andrii, two war veterans bearing both physical wounds and the invisible scars of PTSD, find solace in each other as they navigate the long road to recovery. Their bond offers a fragile hope for healing, but as they confront the lasting impact of trauma and the challenge of rebuilding their lives, their connection is tested in a quiet, deeply human struggle for love, strength, and renewal.

results.title: ARCHAEOLOGY OF UNBORN FACES
results.overview: "Archaeology of Unborn Faces" is a silent cinematic excavation of the AI latent space. It stands before a digital purgatory, witnessing the agonizing struggle of algorithms trying to manifest into human form. In an epoch drowning in simulation, the film reveals that the machine creates nothing from the void, but rather recycles our abandoned memories, culminating in a terrifying emotional resonance.

results.title: S4E9
results.overview: Characters in a children's horror TV show realize that their reality is not what it seems.

results.title: Needle & The Chronic
results.overview: With a little help from their friends, two young trans women navigate an uncertain future after a break-up.

results.title: Gepellte Haut
results.overview: Four young people from Berlin decide to spend their summer in Portugal. They throw away their smart phones, open up their relationships and try to free themselves from any social norms. But just as their utopia comes true, a devastating forest fire breaks out around them.

results.title: El río que nos lleva
results.overview: In 1946, an irishman joins a group of 'gancheros' (wood workers) while they drive wood thru the Tajo river, discovering human solidarity.

results.title: Psycho
results.overview: A psychological thriller exploring the fragile boundary between perception and reality, where characters confront their inner demons and moral conflicts while navigating suspense-driven events that challenge identity, truth, and human nature.

results.title: Dreams of Violets
results.overview: Tehran, January 2026. Dreams of Violets is a 74-minute docudrama feature inspired by real events from 47 years of Iranian civilian resistance. Through the eyes of five strangers, it brings protest footage to life with raw immediacy. At dawn, as Iranian forces execute wounded protesters, a violent soldier discovers the five hiding in a dead-end  alley. Above them, Amir, a child in a wheelchair, watches from a window and decides to act.

results.title: Ultimate Spider-Man: Origins
results.overview: After the horrific death of Peter Parker, a new Spider-Man emerges. 17-year-old Miles Morales, bitten by a radioactive spider, becomes the new wall-crawler the city of New York needs. All the while, on his journey meets an unlikely ally.

results.title: L(')A NORMALE
results.overview: After being hit by a car, Marc and Maïa, two strangers, find themselves in a place between life and death, where they talk and confront their friendship problems without knowing whether they will survive or not...

results.title: THE A-CARE -Disusebody-
results.overview: At the "Ijinzaka Clinic" day service, a revolutionary treatment devised by Director Urushihara is secretly spreading among the elderly. Aiming for the ultimate cost-effective care, the amputation of "Disusebody" (limbs with no hope of recovery) has reportedly led to unexpected positive side effects, such as patients feeling "lighter in body and mind" or "developing a gentler personality." Yagura, an editor who hears these rumors, senses a potential revolution in geriatric medicine and proposes a book deal to Urushihara. However, an internal whistleblower leak about the daycare center soon surfaces in a weekly magazine. Following a shocking incident at a patient's home, everything begins to spiral into darkness.

results.title: Only What We Carry
results.overview: Set against the windswept coast of Normandy. Described as “a meditation on love, loss, and the quiet courage it takes to move forward”.

results.title: GCW: Guilty Conscience 2026
results.overview: The lawless energy of Game Changer Wrestling returns to the Motor City! GCW takes over the legendary Harpos Concert Theatre for "Guilty Conscience 2026." Known for its gritty atmosphere and die-hard fans, Detroit becomes the epicenter of independent wrestling as the promotion brings its unique blend of high-octane athleticism and ultraviolent chaos back to one of its favorite haunts.  Tag Team Warfare: The Pillars vs VNDL48  Women's Showcase: Allysin Kay vs Vipress  Singles Grudge Match: Dr. Redacted vs Anakin Murphy

results.title: Lactar
results.overview: A 62-year-old woman, trapped in a life of empty privilege, becomes pregnant by her driver. Facing rejection from her family and society, she decides to fight to bring to life a baby that seems impossible at her late age, regardless of the consequences.

results.title: Petey & I
results.overview: Albert Minogue is a grieving father looking for spiritual reconciliation, instead he discovers a baby alien called Petey who he believes to be a reincarnation of his deceased son.

results.title: The Bell: Panggilan Untuk Mati
results.overview: When a stolen bell unleashes the vengeful ghost of Panebok in Belitong, a shaman’s last descendant must recover the artifact and master forbidden rituals to stop its bloody rampage—before nine lives are claimed, including his own.

results.title: The Violin Case
results.overview: A painter has the worst night of his life after leaving his violin artwork in the back of a taxi in Macao.

results.title: Hotel Amor
results.overview: When the hotel where workaholic Catarina works is sold, she needs to show her skills to manage unprofessional staff, look after eccentric guests and deal with ghosts from the past, which are brought back by the visit of an unexpected friend.

results.title: Kevlar Soul
results.overview: Brothers Alex and Robin live in miserable conditions with their violent and severely alcoholic father. In an effort to make life bearable, Alex tries to keep his father in a good mood while taking on a parental role for his younger brother, who is aggressive and unruly. When Alex falls for Ines and travels with her to Berlin, the brothers begin to drift apart, and disaster soon becomes inevitable.

results.title: Poca Pon
