results.overview: Inspired by a bizarre murder case, this is the story of a family and the voice "POCA PON" — a voice that sometimes heals people, and sometimes destroys them.

results.title: 映画『正直不動産』
results.overview: An elite real estate agent who lost the ability to lie due to a curse must navigate the cutthroat industry using only the honest truth.

results.title: Nausicaa
results.overview: A girl, whose father is from Greece, studies ancient art in France. The film was made for television but never broadcast for political reasons related to its portrayal of Greeks. A work print was screened in Belgium in 1971, and the film is now available in reconstructed form.

results.title: Spring
results.overview: In a Russian-occupied town in southeastern Ukraine, where burying the dead has been forbidden, the church of a young priest, Andriy, has been turned into a morgue for executed Ukrainian civilians. As the occupation tightens its grip, Andriy quietly begins to resist, secretly returning the bodies to their families at great personal risk. Along the way, he forms an unexpected bond with Makarov, an 11-year-old boy who becomes the silent witness to his rebellion.

results.title: Spring
results.overview: In a Russian-occupied town in southeastern Ukraine, where burying the dead has been forbidden, the church of a young priest, Andriy, has been turned into a morgue for executed Ukrainian civilians. As the occupation tightens its grip, Andriy quietly begins to resist, secretly returning the bodies to their families at great personal risk. Along the way, he forms an unexpected bond with Makarov, an 11-year-old boy who becomes the silent witness to his rebellion.

results.title: DAY THREE
results.overview: Nathan, 23, descends into a night of intimacy, euphoria and disorientation. He jolts awake at the care of paternal figure, Sam, who helps him survive through the aftermath of a chillout. Cracks begin to show as Nathan’s smile is quieter now – aware that survival isn’t the same as safety, and that next time, the night might not let them go so easily.

results.title: Chill Pill
results.overview: After their friend passes away, a group of friends deals with the loss in an... unconventional way. The group are forced to reckon with the question of whether they were good friends and finally let their friend go.

results.title: Love, Again
results.overview: Caroline and Henry's 30-year marriage faces upheaval when he's diagnosed with early-onset Alzheimer's. As Henry's memory deteriorates, Caroline finds comfort in friendship with Leo while coping with losing her partner.

results.title: Cotton Fever
results.overview: A mosaic of characters struggle with addiction and love on the streets of Boston during the height of the fentanyl epidemic

results.title: Patinage : Les championnes brisent la glace
results.original_title: Patinage : Les championnes brisent la glace

results.title: Before It’s Too Late
results.overview: While searching for her grandmother who vanished without a trace from a Seoye studio, Jisu encounters a mysterious woman delivering ramyun.

results.title: 9/11: Reclaiming Ground Zero
results.overview: After the 9/11 attacks, after the smoke was gone, after the rubble cleared away, New Yorkers had a city to rebuild. In response to fast-tracked redevelopment plans, more than 5,000 people gathered in the largest town hall in American history. They came to vote on the city’s six proposals for rebuilding Ground Zero. But instead, the people rejected the top down approach and successfully charted a new path forward. Their work determined what is at Ground Zero today. And their story is an example of what democracy can look like.

results.title: The Last Solution
results.overview: Within the confines of a massive wall, a group of children plays as if there were no tomorrow

results.title: In Paradiso Per Scambio
results.overview: Paolo, a thirty-year-old overwhelmed by responsibilities, visits his mother Lina. Between jokes and confidences, his desire to start a family with his girlfriend Laura emerges, despite work pressures. Meanwhile, in the heart of the same neighborhood, Marco lives a complicated relationship with Sara and is involved in increasingly shady dealings that, due to a case of mistaken identity, will also sweep Paolo into the chaos.

results.title: Visa pa'l mundial
results.overview: The story follows the adventures of various characters in their desperate attempt to obtain a "visa" or the necessary means to accompany the team to the World Cup.

results.title: Nostalgia for the Future
results.overview: Guided by the evocative narration of Charlotte Rampling, Nostalgia for the Future is a descent into the labyrinthine world of Chris Marker, the “best-known author of unknown films,” who spent a lifetime concealing himself behind a veil of pseudonyms and images of cats.  Moving through a constellation of personal documents and film fragments, an archivist attempts to decode the man through the material traces he left behind. By repurposing and recontextualizing Marker’s own body of work, the film treats his images as “time machines,” transforming the archive into a landscape of living memory. Nostalgia for the Future is a meditation on memory, identity, and the power our past images hold over the futures we imagine.

results.title: TRUNK
results.overview: When Alex is duct taped and thrown in the trunk of a Chevy Malibu by a sloppy daytime kidnapper, she does everything right.

results.title: Relevé
results.overview: In ballet, the term Relevé refers to the rising up of the body sur les demi-pointes (balls of feet) or sur les pointes (all the way raised en pointe/tips of toes) where the supporting legs are kept completely straight. The physical action of the rise broken down linguistically approaches re/lever- a sort of secondary coming or awakening of self in “re-rising” that we see as often facilitated by the use of art where all else feels lost or broken. An ode to our collective attachment to dance as well as art as it manifestes itself in various forms, Relevé depicts a surreal parallel of how art not only heals us through escapism, but is also the tangible thread that liberates us as we piece ourselves together again.

results.title: That Friend
results.overview: Paul, “That Friend” who turns one drink into a full-blown bender, crashes his best friend Henry’s romantic weekend with his new girlfriend Penny, only to unleash chaos when his drug-laced cigarettes disappear into a stranger's hands.

results.title: Wet Paper Bag
results.overview: A former investigative journalist goes undercover at a psychedelic wellness center to find her missing sister. What she uncovers is far more unsettling than she expected.  Wet Paper Bag is a psychological drama that explores identity, control, and the quiet tension beneath carefully constructed lives.

results.title: Subsumed
results.overview: Detective Madeleine Ferguson, investigating a cold case at her own will, arrives at a strange house, greeted by a man who isn’t as he seems, leading them both into a fight for her life as she uncovers the houses secrets.

results.title: Unification of Japan 74
results.overview: With Baba (Akihiko Kuwata) acting as Kyowakai chairman and Sakota (Hideo Nakano) leading the Marugami-kai, both groups begin a new chapter. Kyowakai finalizes long-delayed executive appointments: Hayashida (Ehara Shu) replaces the retired Nakajima as Shikoku block leader, while Hirakawa (Hitomi Matsuda) becomes Tohoku block leader by Baba’s nomination, easing concerns from Himuro (Yasukaze Motomiya), Tamura (Yoshiyuki Yamaguchi), and Ueki (Daisuke Nagakura).  While drinking in Kobe, Baba drunkenly orders Himuro and others to “crush Marugami,” and the remark quickly spreads to Marugami and investigators. Baba then orders a manhunt, but Hirakawa objects and questions why the “Adachi-kai,” a group of delinquent gangs that fled Kyowakai’s control and formed in Tohoku, had been ignored. After being calmed by Himuro, Hirakawa heads to Tohoku to handle the group himself—setting the stage for new tensions involving Baba, Hirakawa, and the Adachi-kai.

results.title: Unification of Japan 74
results.overview: With Baba (Akihiko Kuwata) acting as Kyowakai chairman and Sakota (Hideo Nakano) leading the Marugami-kai, both groups begin a new chapter. Kyowakai finalizes long-delayed executive appointments: Hayashida (Ehara Shu) replaces the retired Nakajima as Shikoku block leader, while Hirakawa (Hitomi Matsuda) becomes Tohoku block leader by Baba’s nomination, easing concerns from Himuro (Yasukaze Motomiya), Tamura (Yoshiyuki Yamaguchi), and Ueki (Daisuke Nagakura). results.title: Hiatus
results.overview: Lukas embarks a journey of acceptance and reprisal of art after Marianne leaves.

results.title: 1995 - Hopes and Betrayals
results.overview: In 1995, Quebec faced a harrowing choice: remain part of Canada or establish itself as a separate country. The future of a nation and a lifelong dream were at stake in this referendum. Through interviews and analysis, journalists Antoine Robitaille and Dave Noël delve into the secret strategies, fierce rivalries, and political maneuvering of both sides.

results.title: Vote Gavin Lyle
results.overview: Gavin Lyle, a proud flag-waving and full English breakfast-eating Brit, seeks to help his country overcome its deep-rooted problems, problems he blames squarely on immigration.

results.title: Stupid Children
results.overview: A man ends up seeking a violent solution to his relationship issues after encountering an aggressive dog.

results.title: Half-Baked
results.overview: Kasia is studying at a prestigious French school for future master chefs, whilst her father, Otar, runs a restaurant in Poland serving Georgian specialities. When the girl is expelled from the elite course, she returns home but does not reveal the cause of her sudden arrival to her father.

results.title: Project Baby
results.overview: The story follows Sandy, a 30-something advertising executive who, fearing her biological clock is ticking, launches "Project Baby"—a step-by-step mission to conceive a child on her own terms with a no-strings-attached donor. She selects Migo, a sensitive artist, but quickly realizes that meticulous plans can't account for human emotion.

results.title: Video Hearts
results.overview: A mysterious VHS dating tape from the 1980s becomes the centerpiece of a chilling found-footage nightmare in Video Hearts, a horror short from filmmaker Ken Cohen. What begins as an awkward relic of lonely-hearts video culture slowly reveals something far more sinister hidden beneath the tape’s nostalgic surface, blending analog horror aesthetics with eerie psychological dread.

results.title: Nightmares Unleashed 2: Joseph's Revenge
results.overview: The Nightmare Never Ends as Raven must face her nightmares one last time, however Joseph knows how she is and is pulling out all the stops this time to finally claim his prize...Raven herself.

results.title: Me in a Nutshell
results.overview: A dimwitted yet curious creature gets stuck in a nutshell and does everything in his power to break out.

results.title: Butcher: Invisible Wounds
results.overview: A major feature-length ITV documentary about footballer Terry Butcher will chart his career as well as the devastating personal tragedy of the loss of his Army veteran son.  Butcher is one of England's most celebrated players, with 77 caps, seven times as captain. Photos and footage of him playing on with a bandage around a head injury during a vital World Cup qualifier provide one of the iconic images of the national team's history. Butcher's achievements in the club game include trophy-winning stints at Ipswich Town and Glasgow Rangers.  But Butcher: Invisible Wounds also tells the story of the personal loss he endured following the death of his son Chris, a British Army veteran who passed away after suffering severe PTSD.

results.title: Precipice
results.overview: A reckless group of teens on the run from the ever approaching future engage in a downward spiral of drug abuse, violence, and existentialism.

results.title: Kidnapped by My Mum
results.overview: At 11 years old, Alex Batty vanished on what was supposed to be a short family holiday with his mother and grandfather. An international missing persons investigation was launched, but years passed without a trace.  Then, six years later, a teenager appeared on the side of a road in the French Pyrenees and told a passing driver that he'd been kidnapped.  Alex, now aged 20, is ready to tell the full story about his abduction and his life on the run. For the first time, he retraces the route of his disappearance across Spain and France, uncovering not just how he was hidden but the belief system that kept him there. Each revelation builds a chilling picture of how easy it was for a child to disappear in plain sight.

results.title: Adulto/Homem
results.overview: What can 20 actors’ faces, waiting for a casting call, reveal?

results.title: Nail-Biter
results.overview: On the eve of her eighteenth birthday, anxious nail-biter Amy Heller confronts her overbearing mother about their so-called family curse, a finger-devouring creature that preys on those who bite their nails, just as the monster arrives to claim her as its next victim.  A gothic horror short and proof-of-concept for a feature film.

results.title: Jean-Michel
results.overview: Follows Basquiat’s early life as the child of middle-class Haitian and Puerto Rican parents in Brooklyn, through his adventures in the punk subculture and up to his breakout as a major American artist. All the while, special attention is paid to Basquiat’s mental and emotional state, with interviews from former friends and colleagues to supplement his sisters’ impressions.

results.title: This Bloody Country
results.overview: In 1869, a family leaves Salt Lake City on an arduous journey to establish a new outpost of their church. They cart all their belongings, leaving safety behind. The terrain is rough and unforgiving. When an encounter with dangerous men turns violent, their attempt to flee proves futile. Left with no other choice, they must prepare to defend themselves from an expected attack. Their pursuers hold the advantage because a party of mostly women and children are no match for outlaws in the wild country… unless they are.

results.title: Bang My Box: The Robin Byrd Story
results.original_title: Bang My Box: The Robin Byrd Story
results.overview: Robin Byrd pioneered NYC public access with her cult sex-positive call-in show.  Now the larger-than-life 70-year-old champion of free speech, queer visibility, and safe sex reflects on her unique legacy and her hidden, decades-long marriage behind the scenes.

results.title: Back 2 Back - Paris dans la légende
results.original_title: Back 2 Back - Paris dans la légende

results.title: Khao Kala
results.overview: The village of Khao Kala is renowned having the most UFO sightings in Thailand. For years, skeptics and believers have debated the veracity of the sightings.

results.title: OH BOYS
results.overview: In a coastal village obsessed with standing out, through flashy solos, fierce ping pong matches, and clumsy dates, a young saxophonist takes a different path.

results.title: No Way to Escape
results.overview: Five years ago, Lei Ming acted rashly, resulting in the death of his mentor, Lian Ping, in an explosion. Guilt-ridden, he severs ties with his mentor's daughter, Lian Hui, and devotes all his efforts to solving the case in order to comfort the deceased.

results.title: 77 Minutes
results.overview: Director Kim hasn't made a film in a decade. The lead of her first short appears as a spirit: "You stopped filming—and I aged." Betting her life savings on a 77-minute feature, she searches for a vanished actress. Reality and fantasy blur until the God of Film appears... "Why do I love you?"

results.title: An Inconvenience
results.overview: An Inconvenience is a short film about a depressed guy who sees something he shouldn't.

results.title: Cardigan
results.overview: A couple consider buying a second home in Cardigan, only to discover the town has strange rules about knitwear.

results.title: Madrugada
results.overview: Koki, a gardener in Guatemala City, hides a secret: he is a vampire. By day he lives with his wife, and young son; by night he feeds in the shadows. Together, the parents try to shield the boy from the curse. But when the hunger awakens in him, something irreversible occurs, sealing a tragic inheritance.

results.title: Black Dove
results.overview: When a man leading a double life is murdered during a secret affair, a troubled detective investigating the case must navigate lies, jealousy, and betrayal to uncover the woman who framed the perfect crime.

results.title: My Girlfriend Turned Into a Worm
results.original_title: My Girlfriend Turned Into a Worm
results.overview: When his girlfriend inexplicably turns into a worm, Arthur builds her a miniature world in an attempt to process his grief.

results.title: The LPC Files - Episode 1
results.overview: A short film following the first installment in the LPC files film franchise. Chris Evans got her pregnant?

results.title: Caterpillar
results.overview: Set in a run-down Wellington villa in 2003, CATERPILLAR follows three women living separate lives under one leaky roof. Sixteen-year-old Cassie is all bravado and vulnerability, drifting into risky territory as she searches for belonging. Her mother Maxine, 52, is a formidable single parent and filmmaker on the brink of a long-awaited breakthrough, finally offered a greenlight—if she can land a star. Holding everything together is Huia, Cassie’s grandmother, 80, whose life has been defined by quiet service to family and a private obsession with raising monarch caterpillars, dreaming of one day witnessing the legendary butterfly migration in Mexico.

results.title: CHANGES - a rappid. backyard documentary
results.overview: “changes” is a rappid. documentary following the BPN G1M Backyard Ultramarathon, where three rappid. athletes — Kim Gottwald, Aleksander Piotr Lingauer, and Alyssa McClellan — took on one of the toughest endurance races in April 2026.

results.title: Broken
results.overview: After a domestic violence incident, Shelly accidentally kills her abuser in self defence, leading to a strong feeling of guilt and loss.

results.title: Camp Taywiyuska
results.overview: Two summer camp counselors face their fears when they are woken to a strange noise in the night.

results.title: Somebody's Watching Me
results.overview: After a friend's bachelorette weekend, Lori receives a flash drive with footage from a hidden camera at their Airbnb. The footage is of her sleeping and then a masked stranger entering the room and watching her.

results.title: Sea Legs
results.overview: The revelation of a late father's second family forces his grieving daughter to acknowledge the skeletons in her own closet.

results.title: The Fall of the Nighthawk
results.overview: In the late 1940s, a weary assassin known as the Nighthawk sits alone in a late-night diner, awaiting his inevitable end. Three distinct figures from his criminal world converge on him, each with their own agendas. Caught between their compelling offers and threats, the Nighthawk must decide how - and whether - he wants to face his fate. But in this city, the Establishment always collects its debts.

results.title: ENHYPEN: IMMERSION IN CINEMAS
results.overview: A groundbreaking VR concert experience to theaters, showcasing a virtual, intimate performance featuring hits like "Bite Me" and "XO (Only If You Say Yes)" in special formats including ScreenX, 4DX, and Ultra 4DX for an immersive, 360-degree experience.

results.title: The Metropolitan Opera: Eugene Onegin
results.overview: Tchaikovsky’s many moods—tender, grand, melancholy—are all given free rein in Eugene Onegin. The opera is based on Pushkin’s iconic verse novel, which reimagines the Byronic romantic anti-hero as the definitive bored Russian aristocrat caught between convention and ennui; Tchaikovsky, similarly, took Western European operatic forms and transformed them into an authentic and undeniably Russian work. At the core of the opera is the young girl Tatiana, who grows from a sentimental adolescent into a complete woman in one of the operatic stage’s most convincing character developments.

results.title: Grindr Presents: Madonna LIVE in New York
results.original_title: Grindr Presents: Madonna LIVE in New York
results.overview: Madonna is performing LIVE! Starting off Pride Month by welcoming the community back to the dance floor, and debuting new tracks from Confessions II.  Motha is delivering, and we’re only four days into Pride. Grab your friends, turn up the volume, and join us for a night of music, celebration, and pure queer joy. The dance floor is officially open!

results.title: A Showder Klub bemutatja - 40/20 - Kiss Ádám
results.original_title: A Showder Klub bemutatja - 40/20 - Kiss Ádám

results.title: General Admission
results.overview: Determined to move on from her cheating ex, a woman joins a support group seeking a fresh start, only to overshare her deepest fears until her healing journey takes an unexpected turn.

results.title: Sexo e Destino
results.overview: Between two families marked by betrayal and obsession—the Nogueiras and the Torres—forces from the spiritual realm work to lead each character to a reckoning with their own destiny.

results.title: About the Beginning
results.overview: Somewhere in the Balkans, Anna explores her power of intuition while road-tripping with her old friend Armando, an amateur video-blogger who tries too hard. When Anna starts to wonder if friendships have an expiry date, she meets Goran, a famous actor facing a personal crisis. Their brief encounter sparks in Goran a mysterious vision, guiding him to meet "H", a silent man who might have the answers he is looking for.

results.overview: Upcoming Eid UL Adha Natok of Bangladesh 2026

results.overview: A slacker taking care of his ailing grandfather finds himself in over his head when he invites his best friend over to get high.

results.title: Brush
results.overview: A father and son tries to mend their relationship while working on a plan to fake the old man's death.

results.title: Born to Fly
results.overview: Born To Fly, directed and produced by Ali Khajeian, tells the story of dedication and perseverance through the eyes of Hong Kong born, Indian national, Melbourne-based Ultra Runner, Rahul Sharma, from running his first marathon to setting a world record all in the same year. Between 24th – 30th December 2025, Rahul became the first person ever to run the length of  Sri Lanka, setting a new world record for the fastest time to cover the 566km journey (completing the run in 6 days, 13hours and 22 minutes). The intricacies and procedures of this great feat, planned by the team of students that surround him are captured in this documentary and Born To Fly follows the story of Rahul and his team in making this dream a reality.

results.title: The Haunting of Pennhurst
results.overview: Once a notorious institution for people with disabilities, Pennhurst finally closed after decades of abuse in 1987. Now those doors are reopening, as a group of disabled performers reframe the narrative around the site's harmful history – as a haunted house.

results.title: The Power of Utopia: Living with Le Corbusier in Chandigarh
results.original_title: Kraft der Utopie – Leben mit Le Corbusier in Chandigarh
results.overview: With the construction of the Indian planned city of Chandigarh, the Swiss and French architect Le Corbusier completed his life's work 70 years ago. Chandigarh is a controversial synthesis of the arts, a bold utopia of modernity. The film accompanies four cultural workers who live in the planned city and reflects on Le Corbusier's legacy, utopian urban ideas and the cultural differences between East and West in an atmospherically dense narrative.

results.title: The Power of Utopia: Living with Le Corbusier in Chandigarh
results.original_title: Kraft der Utopie – Leben mit Le Corbusier in Chandigarh
results.overview: With the construction of the Indian planned city of Chandigarh, the Swiss and French architect Le Corbusier completed his life's work 70 years ago. Chandigarh is a controversial synthesis of the arts, a bold utopia of modernity. The film accompanies four cultural workers who live in the planned city and reflects on Le Corbusier's legacy, utopian urban ideas and the cultural differences between East and West in an atmospherically dense narrative.

results.title: Micronations
results.overview: Sovereignty, borders, and community. Passports, constitutions, and anthems. All these topics swirl together in this feature film exploration of micronations. You might just be ready to start your own country by the end of it.

results.title: The Ashes of Love
results.overview: Two wounded souls meet in Hiroshima, a city that remembers everything, and together they confront the love and pain they've tried to forget.

results.title: Recluse
results.overview: After being summoned back to her childhood home to care for her bedridden father, Joan must confront the unearthed demons of her family's past and contend with the home's dark, malevolent energy that is both unseen and, much to her horror, seen.

results.title: Triassic Cuddle
results.overview: A small prehistoric amphibian goes on a journey with the goal of finding its mate.

results.title: Hamletmachine
results.overview: Hamlet and Ophelia reckon with their doomed narratives. Adapted from the 1977 East German Heiner Müller play of the same name.

results.title: Second Life
results.overview: Inspired by a true story, "Second Life" follows a woman determined to swim across Taiwan's Sun Moon Lake before she loses her sight completely. She's joined by a group of visually impaired swimmers, all guided by a once-celebrated coach haunted by his past. As they train together, they battle fear, doubt, and old wounds—transforming pain into strength, and strangers into a family. More than a swim, it becomes a journey of healing, redemption, and proving that even in darkness, the human spirit shines brightest.

results.title: Breathing Under Water
results.overview: What stops two people from being together? A third one. What stops one person from fighting for another? Nothing. Pedro lives in the suburbs, where he works with his father in a garage. Everyday he takes the bus downtown where he goes to school and meets his friends. It's summertime and they all go down to the river where they spend their free time or even their school time. Among joints, motorbike riding and swimming, everything seems to go well with this group of friends, until the moment when Pedro and his best friend find out that both of them like the same girl. Pedro finds himself inside a downward spiral, where everything around him seems to fall apart. Like a magnet attracts the iron, Pedro seems to attract problems, from the school until his relationship with his parents. This is the story of Pedro, who by having his head being pushed down so much learned how to breathe under water.

results.title: Love Can't Let Go
results.overview: Before the family home in Shalun, Taoyuan, was demolished under the Taoyuan Aerotropolis redevelopment project, the director's mother passed away unexpectedly. Yet in her absence, the family's long-fragile order seemed to stabilize, even appearing strangely "happy." This subtle and difficult truth compels the director to repeatedly return to the old house on the verge of disappearance, insisting on bringing back her father and brothers, who are trying to move on. As the boundaries between filming and being filmed blur, differing attitudes toward farewell gradually emerge, and long-suppressed memories begin to seep through. The director is left asking herself: Is this an attempt to preserve memory, or a way of trapping herself in a cycle of loss from which she cannot find closure.​​​

results.title: Do You Love Me
results.overview: A playful and personal journey through Lebanon’s audiovisual memory, composed entirely of archival footage. It is a love letter to Beirut, spanning 70 years of film, TV, home videos, and photography, exploring the Lebanese collective psyche – marked by joy and intimacy, destruction and loss. Through the eyes of citizens, filmmakers and artists, the film reconstructs a fragmented history in a country without a national archive, celebrating creative expression as both resistance, renewal and a way to preserve memory.

results.title: Moonlight
results.overview: A father-daughter tale where werewolves, fables, and the realities of life intertwine

results.title: Fractures
results.overview: An isolated woman toils for acceptance.

results.title: Death Has No Master
results.overview: Caro travels to Venezuela to sell her late father’s cacao plantation, only to find the family mansion occupied by its former staff, who are determined to remain at all costs. As Caro takes justice into her own hands to claim the inheritance she believes is hers, she sets off a struggle that unearths the violence buried in the land and its memory.

results.title: Vigil
results.overview: Wayne, a rough and ragged detective, tries to solve a case that has eluded him for years. Will he find what he’s looking for, or will there be more questions than answers?

results.title: The Youngins
results.overview: He is from Torre del Bierzo, an industrial mining town, where the name El Chispas inherits from, working in the family workshop.  She is a city girl who avoids the summers in his village, Sueros de Cepeda. Floating on his skates.  In a hot summer of the 90s they bathe together in the Villameca swamp. Everything changes when they discover the open secret under its waters.

results.title: Erica
results.overview: Takumi, a man who is unpopular with women and hasn’t had a girlfriend for 23 years, happens to walk into a café one day and falls in love at first sight with Erica, a waitress. However, she is suffering from domestic violence from her boyfriend, Ryo. Takumi tries to help her, but their relationship becomes entangled with the presence of Takumi's sister, Yuka, a waitress at the café where he works part-time, and Ryo's brother, Toru.

results.title: Sarar Shongshar
results.overview: On a dark night, Khosru gets trapped in blackmail and tense questions on a rooftop. Suddenly, Sara hears a terrifying scream. Was it only an accident, or did something much more frightening happen that night?

results.title: JOHN
results.overview: After mistreatment at her law firm, a black female lawyer disguises herself as a white man.

results.title: What We Carry
results.overview: After multiple miscarriages, a woman’s desperate wish for motherhood is granted—but in a way she never expected.

results.title: The Sea
results.overview: Khaled (12), a Palestinian boy is on his way to visit the sea for the first time in his life, at the checkpoint, the Israeli authorities deny his entry. Determined, Khaled sneaks into Israel and embarks on a dangerous journey to the sea. Meanwhile, Ribhi, his father, is trying to trace his whereabouts, putting himself at risk of being arrested and losing his job.

results.title: Zwei am Zug
results.overview: Sandra, a pub landlady, meets Otis, a travel agent. The two initially clash as they learn more about each other from overheard phone calls than they would like. But they get talking, discover an amazing affinity and find each other to be valuable love advisors for their personal relationship problems. When Sandra's husband Christian meets Otis' best friend Bill by chance one day, the emotional chaos is perfect.

results.title: All Night Wrong
results.overview: Gary and Ell (a married man with an inferiority complex, and a grieving young widow) meet on a blind date only to wind up stealing a killer's car along with a dead body and $40,000.

results.title: Ember
results.overview: An elderly couple is trapped in their village near Kyiv as it falls under Russian occupation. When a fire destroys their home, they are forced to seek refuge with neighbors and find a way out.

results.title: Trial 670
results.overview: A medical trial for a new depression medication turns sinister.

results.title: La soirée avait si bien commencé
results.original_title: La soirée avait si bien commencé

results.title: The Alice Paradox

Trapped in a world that has diverged from ours during the Cold War, and which prizes collectivism over individuality, Alice is forced to confront her life choices, grappling with profound questions about identity, fate, and the search for meaning.

results.title: American Deadbeats
results.overview: A group of small-town filmmakers chase their dream of making a movie despite having no budget, no connections, and no idea what they’re doing.

results.title: Dictatrix
results.overview: Nana Yaa-Ghana's first female president-is thrust into a deadly web of political intrigue that threatens not only her power but her life.

results.title: Behind One Smile
results.overview: A fourteen year old boy is his family's last hope in war torn Syria. Fearing involuntary recruitment, he tries to find luck outside of the country, eventually ending up in a Croatian refugee camp where he meets a documentarian that's willing to tell his story.

results.title: In Case We Never Meet Again
results.original_title: In Case We Never Meet Again
results.overview: Amid the war in Ukraine, Tanya and Zenit’s fragile love story unfolds, stretched between moments of closeness and conflict. Meanwhile, a group of children play war, building block posts, and imagining futures defined by violence.

results.title: Kingston
results.overview: On the illustrious campus of Kingston College, prestige drips off students, faculty and architecture. Amid social turmoil, three intertwining tales of disillusioned misfits collide under the machinations of an all-seeing institution.

results.title: 72 Hours on Gardraxis
results.overview: Reunited after 10 years, a father and daughter must reconcile their differences and escape a dangerous alien planet before it's too late

results.title: Alley of Bogwang
results.overview: In the alleys of Bogwang-dong, on the verge of disappearance, the film follows lingering bodies and their traces. The voice of a traditional Korean vocalist and the ringing of bells awaken the sleeping alleyways, while a dancing body moves through them, revealing the village's time and an unfinished story.

results.title: Trap
results.overview: A young man is wrongfully convicted and imprisoned. Years later, upon gaining his freedom, he embarks on a journey to uncover the truth behind the conspiracy that destroyed his life. As he pushes the boundaries of justice, he realizes that everything is far more complex than it seems. Kumpas is a gripping tale of revenge, justice, and the thin line between morality and corruption.

results.title: Bluey at the Cinema: Playdates with Friends
results.original_title: Bluey at the Cinema: Playdates with Friends
results.overview: A compilation of eight episodes from across the show’s three series, united around themes of play, friendship and family.

results.title: What's the Story, Wishbone?
results.overview: A behind-the-scenes journey into the creation and lasting legacy of Wishbone, the Emmy-winning PBS series that introduced a generation to classic literature through the adventures of a small dog with a big imagination.

results.title: Purushaha
results.overview: Follows three husbands who, overwhelmed by domestic challenges, initiate a chain of events leading to legal intervention, blending family drama with satire and a quirky superhero-style twist.

results.title: For the Opponents

results.title: The Mystery of Richard Simmons: A Diane Sawyer Special
results.original_title: The Mystery of Richard Simmons: A Diane Sawyer Special
results.overview: The beloved fitness personality's remarkable rise to fame; examining the cultural impact that made him a household name.

results.title: Nike - Rip the Script

Completely tearing up the director's playbook and shattering the rules of the set, elite athletes and internet culture icons stage a chaotic takeover. A high-octane, unpredictable visual feast celebrating the raw, rebellious, and untamable spirit of the beautiful game.

results.title: Fred Pellerin: La descente aux affaires
results.original_title: Fred Pellerin: La descente aux affaires

So, the day he stood before Eternity, he realized he hadn't put any time into his safe. Toussaint was rich, but couldn't even afford to buy back a single second of his life. It was too late.

results.title: Looky-Loo: Part II

results.title: Elfhame: The Cruel Prince

Kidnapped from the mortal world when she was just a child and raised alongside her sisters among the powerful folk, she has learned to protect herself from enchantments and to fight with a sword. Yet, day after day, she endures mockery and insults.

results.title: Open All Hours: Inside Out
results.overview: Retrospective celebrating the shop sitcom, including a new short scene starring David Jason. Also features Diane Morgan, Johnny Vegas, Tim Healy and Charlotte Barker.

results.title: Dua

After an incident shakes her community, she becomes a target herself and bonds with a fearless girl, Maki, who draws her toward an unexpected form of resistance. Between the daily violence and the growing threat of exile, there is little room for quiet awakenings.

results.title: Abandonados

Forty years after being abandoned at a train station in Barcelona, three siblings embark on an investigation to uncover their identity and their past. Through testimonies, archival material, and a long-term investigation, the work reflects on memory, identity, and the search for truth.

results.title: The Yearbook: Waiting for the Teacher
results.overview: On May 27, 1980—the last day of the Gwangju Uprising—students at Sinheung High School in Jeonju defied martial law. Their teacher disciplined them to protect them, but this act of love left forty years of misunderstanding. Now in his nineties, the teacher reunites with his former students to finally offer each other the reconciliation they had long set aside.

results.title: Procrastination Yoga

results.original_title: Mad Bills to Pay (or Destiny, dile que no soy malo)
results.overview: Rico’s summer is a mix of chasing girls and hustling homemade cocktails out of a cooler on Orchard Beach, the Bronx. But when Destiny, his teenage girlfriend, crashes at his place with his family, it’s only a matter of time before his carefree days come spiraling down.

results.title: Cookie, Love

results.title: The Secrets of the Matriarch
results.overview: Danielle travels to New Orleans to meet her grandmother and uncover the truth about her mother's death. Drawn into a dangerous feud with the rival Benoit family, Danielle learns her mother’s death was no accident and must navigate treachery, uncover secrets, and decide whether to destroy both families' legacies to find justice.

results.title: Аэропорт

results.title: Al Ghurbah
results.overview: A Saudi film that portrays loneliness, alienation, and personality change in a silent, subtle way.

results.title: Konspirasi
results.overview: An elite team is deployed to seize a hidden server containing a list of corrupt politicians and offshore financial transactions. Led by Adli and his team, the covert mission turns into a trap when some of the data leaks to the media and the dark web, triggering a national political crisis. As public trust begins to erode and suspicions arise about internal traitors, the team uncovers clues pointing to a cyber expert and a renowned hacker. What starts as a secret operation soon develops into a dangerous conspiracy involving a power struggle in politics, large-scale cyberattacks, and foreign interference aiming to destabilise the country.

results.title: Obsessively Yours

results.title: Via Negativa
results.overview: Dan, a young priest who has abandoned his conservative diocese after learning of the death of his estranged friend, Paul. Struggling with a deep crisis of faith, he embarks on a journey to find the older priest who once abused Paul during their time in seminary. With a wounded coyote in the back of his car, Dan drifts through the American landscape, encountering eccentric travelers, stealing a gun and other assorted trophies, singing Prince songs and stopping at roadside attractions.

results.title: The Double
results.overview: A short film adapted from one of Fyodor Dostoevsky novels: "The Double";Directed by Youssef Askar set to be released in 2026.

results.title: Chinese Animation: A Century
results.overview: A major documentary paying tribute to the centenary of Chinese animation, the film presents, for the first time on the big screen, a panoramic view of the tumultuous and remarkable development of Chinese animation over the past century, through detailed historical materials, vivid narratives, and profound reflections. It takes audiences on a journey through time, reliving the childhood memories of several generations, and witnessing the extraordinary path of Chinese animation from its inception to its rise, from exploration to its glory.

results.title: The Refund

results.title: If I Were You
results.overview: After saving a woman from a love crisis, two strangers agree to make decisions for each other, leading to unexpected life changes while hiding a secret that torments them between lies and truth.

results.title: Plastic Cups
results.overview: A group of masked men make it their mission to take part in the biggest painting heist in history. While they prepare for this extravagant feat, they are challenged with keeping their identities hidden while being hunted down by well trained detectives, with unorthodox, corrupted practices. Will they succeed in their mission?

results.title: The Bench
results.overview: Two students find themselves returning to the same bench in this cryptic short thriller

results.title: Trikala: Script of God
results.overview: Trikala is a heroic story, one of the many mysteries hidden in Indian Sanatana Dharma.When darkness descends on the world, the light comes to save it, trikala is one of the Illuminator..

results.title: Wrestling with Trump
results.overview: Satirist Munya Chawawa immerses himself in US wrestling and MAGA politics, uncovering the links between Donald Trump and the world of body slams, spandex and the power of kayfabe.

results.title: Paper Heart
results.overview: Having despaired after the painful death of a close friend, Ayan is set to perform at a farewell gathering, which helps him sort out their relationship and understand what she truly meant to him — a friend or a lover.

results.title: Khan Tumhara
results.overview: A genre blend of action sequences with romance and drama, centering on the character Yusuf Khan, described as navigating power, love and vengeance.

results.title: Magpie
results.overview: Following the death of her mother, a young and talented pianist must find her way through monumental loss while preparing for an important audition. As grief and ambition begin to clash, Liz attempts to maintain a sense of normalcy while navigating the expectations from both herself and others. However, as she spirals through the stages of denial, anger, and devastation; she must come face-to-face with her loss and confront her grief through music.

results.title: Act One
results.overview: A young aspiring actress, desperate for guidance and belonging, falls under the spell of a manipulative acting coach who draws her into a web of control and obsession.

results.overview: The boy doesn't remember his mother; she abandoned him and his father and moved to America. And the girl has no father. The children, behaving like adults, make the responsible decision to introduce their single parents and get them married.

results.overview: A story about death at an airport

results.title: From All Sides
results.overview: A multiracial bisexual married couple and their teenage children find themselves beset from all sides as they navigate work, school, sex, friendships, romances, and their colorful neighbors in the outer suburbs of Sydney.

results.title: Slag-Offers
results.overview: Two community centre leaders, Karma and Cliff, try to justify their group programme practising the art of the insult. A documentary crew follows them as they facilitate a weird couple of hours.

results.title: Kick Ons
results.overview: When every attempt to leave a looping backyard party fails, two twenty-somethings must confront the fact that their lives- and friendship- are moving on.

results.title: Where the Black Dog Runs
results.overview: As a rural village prepares for its final harvest festival as a luxury building development is greenlit, an ancient threat awakens and Julian must come face to face with a haunting piece of folklore.

results.title: Letters
results.overview: A man helps his friend leave the world behind.

results.title: Oil
results.overview: A mother takes her young son to the beach in an attempt to rebuild their relationship. But what begins as a day of reconciliation shifts when a mysterious presence emerges from the sea, drawing them both into a journey of fear and mystery.

results.title: Chronic Wasting
results.overview: A group of friends go looking for a meteorite, but instead they discover something far more sinister.

results.title: Becoming Kim
results.overview: German filmmaker Susanne, married to a Korean man named Kim Jeong Rae, turns the camera toward her own intercultural marriage and family with both humor and tenderness. Blending vérité and performance, the film dives into the beautiful mess of love, identity, and cultural collision. Becoming Kim asks: How do we stay true to ourselves—while learning to love another?

results.title: Airport BLVD

results.title: The Ferry Flows
results.overview: A grey-haired music teacher from a small Ukrainian island turns into a military conductor at soldier funerals while trying to keep afloat his children ensemble.

results.title: Georgy Guryanov
results.overview: The story of the drummer of Kino and the main fashionista of perestroika Leningrad.

results.title: Love( ) Mave
results.overview: The journey of Mavis, a 23 year old writer based in New York, who's longing for love has had a turbulence lately; despite living the "happily ever after" with her long term boyfriend - Rehan. Being the gifted writer that she is, ironically she can't seem to find the words to express the sudden shift of feelings towards her partner. Tackling themes such as guilt, love, and falling out of it; Love ( ) Mave explores what it's like to be in love with someone with all your being, but just not the way as you had before and all the strings of intimacy in between.

results.title: Framing Her

results.title: ChikaBOOM!

results.title: Rare Birds
results.overview: A trouble-making 12-year-old tries to convince her former camp counselor to ditch his dead-end job at the local antique store for one last game of basketball.

results.title: Picasso: A Rebel in Paris - Story of a Life and a Museum
results.original_title: Picasso a Parigi - Storia di una vita e di un museo
results.overview: The documentary was created to mark the 50th anniversary of Pablo Picasso's death. Inspired by his famous quote, "Painting isn't an aesthetic operation; it's a form of magic" the film focuses on Picasso's life and legacy, centered around the Picasso Museum in Paris. It explores his deep connection to the city, his personal complexities, and new aspects of his work recently uncovered by historians.

results.title: Woodeaters
results.overview: In a historic Lemko church in the region of Podkarpacie, a quiet, relentless battle is being fought against wood-boring beetles that are destroying the church structure. An entomologist, in an attempt to save the church, resorts to radical measures bearing a historical burden.

results.title: The Book of Dreaming
results.overview: A young woman begins to work on a dream journal after she realizes that all of her travels to the dreamscape (be they dreams or nightmares) are related to an old cemetary situated nearby her childhood home.

results.title: Beautiful Evening, Beautiful Day
results.overview: Four close friends, Lovro (21), Nenad (20), Stevan (22), and Ivan (20), fought against the Ustashas and Nazis by joining the partisans in WWII. Sixteen years later, they became renowned filmmakers. In 1957, in Communist Yugoslavia, their sexual orientation raises suspicion, and a communist party loyalist named Emir (52) is assigned to sabotage their careers and lives. The pursuit of freedom becomes a fight for survival for the artists, while Emir's beliefs are challenged.

results.title: Fragile
results.overview: A romance between two students develops as they navigate the frailty of life around them. But as tragedy comes to their doorstep, their love persists in an unexpected way.

results.title: Sacré Bleu
results.overview: In 1969, socially awkward observer, Otto Mcguin agrees to play a lead role in his friend's movie in hopes of sparking a relationship between he and his mysterious on-screen lover, Adaline Kirkoff.

results.title: INNER
results.overview: A writer becomes trapped in a shifting reality where space mirrors his inner world, forcing him to confront a version of himself he no longer recognizes.

results.title: Return
results.overview: The film tells the story of antelope Hardy, who embarks on a difficult journey of self-cultivation in order to fight against the wolves that threaten the group after the death of his father.

results.title: A Fúria
results.overview: Mário returned to the world of the dead. He dug his escape into the earth, with no intention of taking revenge on the powerful men who pursued him. "The Fury (2024)" starts from a fantastic premise, a poetic license, to conclude the trilogy begun by "The Guns (1964)" and "The Fall (1978)."

results.title: Colon Parenthesis
results.overview: After an unconventional biomechanical system begins to experiance technical difficulties, its equally mechanical engineer opts for an unconventional solution to save the day.

results.title: Understanding Myself as an Amphibian
results.overview: This queer ecology documentary explores the sexual diversity of the wildlife around us. Director May Matchim draws connections between these incredible species and her own journey accepting her Transness. The title is a reference to the green frog, an amphibian which is able to change its sex as it matures.  This film includes a variety of animal and plant subjects, including same-sex bird parents raising chicks together, and a group of salamanders that's entirely female. It also examines the exclusionary attitudes in biology and conservation throughout time, and how these attitudes have influenced our understanding of animal behaviour.

results.title: Ydessa, the Bears and etc.
results.overview: Ydessa Hendeles' exhibition entitled "The living and the Artificial" (consisting of works of art all comprising a photograph of living persons in the company of one or several teddy bears) had puzzled Agnès Varda so much that she decided to go to Toronto where the artist lives and interview her. In front of Agnes Varda's DV camera, Ydessa tells about the singularity of her artistic approach. She also expresses herself about the Holocaust, which both her parents survived.

results.title: A Little Life
results.overview: Eleven-year-old Eunha, the lone survivor of her parents' murder-suicide, finds comfort in a shelter through her friendship with Bora and the imaginary world they call "The Fish Dance." When Bora is forced back to her abusive father, Eunha is left devastated, until her aunt Jayeong offers an unexpected proposal.

results.title: Rhapsody, Rhapsody
results.original_title: ラプソディ・ラプソディ
results.overview: When Mikio Natsuno obtains a residency certificate, he is stunned to find the name of a woman he has never met listed as his wife. Apparently, he has been "married" for six months without knowing it. Who on earth is the stranger who decided to become his wife? After a frantic search, Mikio finally discovers her—an eccentric young woman with a striking personality who simply says, "I thought I could keep myself together if I were at least married," oﬀering no further explanation. And so, their uneven, unpredictable relationship slowly begins to take shape.

results.title: Mr. Boogie
results.overview: A comedy directed by Vesna Jovanoska.

results.title: Interlocked
results.overview: An inventor tries to parent her wall-powered robot son. When he tries to discover a world beyond the boundaries she designed for him, she has to choose between keeping him safe and letting him live on his own.

results.title: Depresso
results.overview: A man in New York City spirals into performative masculinity and starts a support group to fix it—only to realize he never wanted healing, just an audience.

results.title: Wrangler
results.overview: Hayoung, a successful dog trainer, is visited by her sister, Sora, who has a criminal record for murder. As Sora's bizarre behavior unsettles the training center and Hayoung's daily routine, buried truths and repressed desires start to rise to the surface.

results.title: Abracadaver
results.overview: To save their father's life, three siblings skilled in magic, escapism, and swindling must steal a priceless mummy from an old hacienda during the "Night of the Dead" party. Success means fortune and peace; failure brings severe consequences.

results.title: Models vs. Werewolves
results.overview: Five young models go to an Airbnb in the woods for a full moon that comes once every five hundred years. What starts off as the perfect girl's trip quickly becomes a nightmare as a pack of ancient werewolves are awoken by the new moon...

results.title: Models vs. Werewolves
results.overview: Five young models go to an Airbnb in the woods for a full moon that comes once every five hundred years. What starts off as the perfect girl's trip quickly becomes a nightmare as a pack of ancient werewolves are awoken by the new moon...

results.title: They Will Be Dust
results.overview: After receiving the diagnosis of an incurable brain tumor, Claudia decides to undertake her last trip to Switzerland. There she can decide how and when to end her life thanks to the help of an assisted suicide association.

results.title: Metropolitan Ride
results.overview: Soobin finally lands a job! With a fluttering heart, she steps into the elevator on her first day. However, countless obstacles still lie between her and her destination: the 7,891st floor. This handmade sci-fi film, created with quiet persistence using 100% analog methods, was made over the past two years, coinciding with the rise of AI as it began to threaten art.

results.title: The Abominable Professor Fausto and the Death of Flavio the Unicorn
results.original_title: O Abominable Profesor Fausto e a Morte do Unicornio Flavio
results.overview: A film teacher, fed up with his students, decides to start torturing and killing his class in gruesome ways. One student will manage to scape and cross to a parallel universe where she'll encounter a series of misterious creatures who will task her with finding the heart of Flavio the Unicorn in order to save her classmates.

results.title: Kucing Hitam
results.overview: Natalie's life turns into a terrifying nightmare after her youngest daughter brings home a mysterious black cat with the power to resurrect the dead. Family members who died in a tragic incident return to life as cold strangers. Natalie is trapped inside the house with a substitute entity controlled by the cat. She soon discovers the harsh reality that her real family is gone and can only watch her from the window as unreachable shadows.

results.title: Opened Doors
results.overview: Two roommates become concerned when their apartment door is found open every morning, so, with the help of the neighbor, they set up cameras to find the culprit.

results.title: Mandie Mander
results.overview: After Mandie Mander gets cheap laughs at her friend’s expense, she finds out that some laughs aren’t worth getting.

results.title: 70 Jahre ESC - More than Music
results.overview: In 2026, the Eurovision Song Contest celebrates its 70th anniversary. With around 160 million viewers, the ESC is one of the world's biggest music spectacles. This documentary looks back on seven decades filled with music, emotions and passion. From its beginnings as a chanson competition in 1956 through flamboyant outfits and spectacular performances to unforgettable victories, bitter defeats and the political debates of the recent past. Stars like Jean Paul Gaultier, Hape Kerkeling, Tom Neuwirth (aka Conchita Wurst), and Germany's first ESC winner, Nicole, share their experiences on and off stage. The documentary paints a multifaceted portrait of the ESC, highlighting its profound influence on music, fashion, and society, as well as on the LGBTQIA+ community, thus becoming a vibrant journey through seven decades of European pop culture history.

results.title: TRENTE
results.overview: An intimate documentary exploring the transition into one's thirties-a time of questioning in a world evolving faster than the one we grew up in. Seb discovers old footage from his youth and confronts past dreams with present reality.

results.title: Turn Around
results.overview: The 45-minute performance moved through three phases. An opening of contained, whispered self-consciousness as students navigated the after-dark building. A middle section in which genuine exchanges and unplanned moments surfaced. A final integration in which the edit, score, cue delivery, and student presence arrived at something unrehearsed and unrepeatable.

results.title: Tosnos
results.overview: Tosnos (তছনছ) is a Bangladeshi Action, Thriller, Mystery film directed by the acclaimed Badiul Alam Khokon. Produced by Munna Khan Multimedia, this cinematic venture stars Munna Khan and Eamin Haque Bobby in the lead roles, alongside powerful supporting performances from veteran actors Misha Sawdagor and Deepa Khandakar. The story is written by Kamal Sarker. This high-stakes thriller is set to explore a gripping narrative of power, corruption, and revenge.

results.title: A Guardian's Heart
results.overview: Jake Bishop has been an exemplary Executive Protection Medic with a distinguished career but life hasn't always been that way for him. There have been miscues, failures, wrong turns and one day he just decides to walk away from it all. His ex boss wants to hire him for one final mission together and when Jake senses redemption for all life's twist and turns, will they survive and can the thought of love save him just in time from a path of destruction. Only time will tell.

results.title: N/A
results.overview: Emmy winner Holland Taylor and Broadway's Ana Villafañe star as two U.S. Representatives, generations apart, who couldn't be more different. Inspired by real people and events, the play N/A is a battle of wills and wits between N, the first woman Speaker of the House, and A, the youngest woman ever elected to Congress.  Filmed from Lincoln Center's Off-Broadway theater in August 2024, N/A is part of Theater Close-Up, a collaboration between THIRTEEN and New York City-area Off-Broadway and regional theaters, shining a primetime spotlight on a diverse mix of innovative theater productions.  Go behind closed doors as these two formidable women debate power, ambition, and change. N/A is written by Congressional aide turned playwright Mario Correa and directed by Tony Award-winning director Diane Paulus (“Jagged Little Pill”).

results.title: Phrogger
results.overview: After discovering unsettling signs that someone may secretly be living inside their home, a group of friends begins documenting the strange occurrences on camera. As paranoia grows and the boundaries between safety and intrusion collapse, the footage reveals a terrifying presence hiding in plain sight.

results.title: Born to Fake
results.overview: In 1996, one of the biggest media scandals in German history shook the public: Michael Born, a self-made journalist, had faked over twenty reports for the newly established private television station between 1990 and 1996. Some seemed amateurish, others dealt with absurd topics: child labor for IKEA in India, drug addicts licking toads to get high, and the Ku Klux Klan in the Eifel region were just some of his numerous fabrications. How did it come to this? Was Michael Born an enlightened figure who subversively exposed the tabloid system, a victim of the system, or simply a bumbling fraud? Film traces Michael Born's footsteps. Put together from hundreds of hours of raw material and the memories of former companions, an incredible story of forgery emerges. A media-theoretical film about levels of reality, fake news, and the question: Why do we actually believe what we see?

results.title: My oh My !
results.overview: A woman takes drugs in a Los Angeles hotel, and has much to say.
